zh-tw.title: 租屋廢文語錄
zh-tw.description: 房租、押金、房東、漏水、同居分攤——在外租屋族的厭世日常，每一句都打在心上

en.title: Renter Life Quotes
en.description: Rent, deposits, landlords, leaks, splitting bills with your partner — the everyday struggles of renting, told in one-liners

items.sourceNote: 房租1萬同居分攤 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我房租比我夢想還貴。
所以我先放棄夢想，繼續繳房租。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給剛收到漲租通知的朋友，或自己貼在書桌前提醒自己為什麼又要加班
variations: 我月薪三分之一拿去繳房租，三分之一拿去吃飯，剩下三分之一拿去懷疑人生。

en.content:
My rent costs more than my dreams.
So I gave up the dreams first to keep paying rent.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just got a rent hike notice, or put it on your desk as a reminder of why you're working overtime
variations: A third of my paycheck goes to rent, a third to food, and a third to questioning my life choices.

items.sourceNote: 說好平分房租男友搬進來耍賴 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content: 同居的意思是：兩個人各付一半房租，一個人付全部的家事。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個正在猶豫要不要跟另一半同居的朋友，提醒她先把家事分工講清楚
variations: 他說同居可以平分房租，後來才知道他連自己那一半都要我先墊。

en.content: Cohabitation means splitting rent fifty-fifty, while one of you does a hundred percent of the chores.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend on the fence about moving in with their partner — a warning to settle the chore split first
variations: He said we'd split rent down the middle. Turns out his half also needed to be fronted by me.

items.sourceNote: Dcard 租屋倒霉鬼分享; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我跟房東的關係比男友還穩定。
因為男友會分手，房東不會。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合單身、住租屋處超過三年的人自嘲，貼在 IG 限動會引共鳴
variations: 認識男友兩年，認識房東五年，到底誰才是長期伴侶。

en.content:
My relationship with my landlord is more stable than with my boyfriend.
Boyfriends break up. Landlords don't.
en.editorNote: Good self-deprecating fodder for single renters of 3+ years — solid Instagram story material
variations: I've known my boyfriend for two years and my landlord for five. Who's actually the long-term partner here?

items.sourceNote: Dcard 漏水 / 半夜共鳴 frame; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
半夜聽到滴滴答答的聲音，
我以為天花板在漏水，
結果是我在哭。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給住老公寓、天花板已經滴了三個月還沒修的朋友，先苦笑再認真叫房東
variations: 房東說漏水沒那麼嚴重，後來我才發現他指的是他的錢包。

en.content:
Heard a steady drip in the middle of the night.
Thought the ceiling was leaking.
Turned out it was me crying.
en.editorNote: Send to that friend whose ceiling has been dripping for three months — laugh first, then call the landlord again
variations: Landlord said the leak wasn't serious. Later realized he meant the leak in his wallet.

items.sourceNote: 2026/1/1 租金補貼婚育家庭加碼50%; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
政府說婚育家庭補助加碼五成，
我只想問——
那單身的可以加碼五成「找到對象」的機會嗎？
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合單身上班族在收到補助公告時轉發，反諷又溫和
variations: 結婚補助加50%，育兒補助加50%，我連男朋友都沒有，只能領基本盤。

en.content:
The government says married couples get a 50% bigger rent subsidy.
Great — can singles get a 50% better chance of finding someone?
en.editorNote: Perfect for single office workers to repost when government subsidy news drops — sarcastic but not bitter
variations: Marriage subsidy plus 50%, childcare subsidy plus 50%. I don't even have a partner, so I get the base rate.

items.sourceNote: 退房押金被刁難 evergreen pain point; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
退房那天，房東拿著手電筒檢查的認真程度，
比我面試新工作還高。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給正在準備退租、整天看 YouTube 學房屋清潔的朋友，互相打氣
variations: 我面試三場才找到工作，房東檢查兩小時才肯退我一千塊押金。

en.content: On move-out day, my landlord inspected the apartment with a flashlight more carefully than my last job interviewer reviewed my resume.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend prepping to move out and binge-watching cleaning tutorials — solidarity in suffering
variations: Took three interviews to get my job. Took my landlord two hours to refund a thousand dollars of my deposit.

items.sourceNote: 租屋梗圖 寵物禁令 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東說：「我們這邊不能養寵物。」
我說：「沒問題，我連自己都養不起。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合剛搬進新租屋的人 self-aware 自嘲，貼 Threads 引共鳴
variations: 房東：「不能養貓狗。」我：「那加班算嗎？我家養了一隻很兇的死線。」

en.content:
Landlord: 'No pets allowed.'
Me: 'No worries, I can barely afford to keep myself alive.'
en.editorNote: Great for first-time renters to post on Threads — self-aware humor that always lands
variations: Landlord: 'No cats or dogs.' Me: 'Does overtime count? I'm keeping a really angry deadline at home.'

items.sourceNote: 房租翻倍漲 evergreen; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東說：「今年只漲一點點。」
那「一點點」是兩千。
我的薪水「一點點」是兩百。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛接到漲租通知的朋友，附上一個哭笑不得的表情符號
variations: 房租漲幅勝過我升遷幅度，房東比老闆還重視我。

en.content:
Landlord: 'Just a small increase this year.'
His 'small' is two thousand.
My raise's 'small' is two hundred.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just got a rent hike notice — pair it with the laugh-cry emoji
variations: My rent grew faster than my paycheck. My landlord believes in me more than my boss does.

items.sourceNote: 看房經驗 591 搜尋疲勞; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
591上的「採光良好」翻譯成中文是：
白天有光，晚上有蚊子，隔壁有鄰居的人生。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給正在 591 看房看到崩潰的朋友，附上一張你看過最爛的看房照
variations: 「近捷運」=走路二十分鐘；「裝潢精美」=家具是別人留下的；「附家電」=只有一台會嘎吱嘎吱的冰箱。

en.content:
'Plenty of natural light' on rental listings translates to:
Light during the day, mosquitoes at night, and your neighbor's entire life story through the wall.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend losing their mind scrolling rental sites — attach your worst listing photo
variations: 'Near the subway' = a twenty-minute walk. 'Beautifully furnished' = previous tenant's leftovers. 'Appliances included' = one wheezing fridge.

items.sourceNote: 電費水費爆表 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
夏天的電費比我想念前任還高，
而且還沒辦法假裝忘記。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合夏天剛收到電費單的人轉發，效果最好是配一張帳單照片
variations: 我跟冷氣的關係比跟前任熱絡，因為冷氣每個月都會找我。

en.content:
My summer electricity bill is higher than the number of times I think about my ex.
And I can't pretend to forget this one.
en.editorNote: Perfect for sharing right after the summer bill arrives — bonus points for attaching a photo of the bill
variations: My AC and I are closer than my ex and I ever were. The AC actually shows up every month.

items.sourceNote: 鄰居噪音 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
樓上的鄰居半夜搬家具，
樓下的鄰居白天練電鋼琴，
隔壁的情侶二十四小時吵架。
我終於明白為什麼房租這麼便宜了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給住老公寓的朋友，互相加油打氣到下個租約結束
variations: 我家不是公寓，是 24 小時實境秀，我每個月還付錢看。

en.content:
Upstairs rearranges furniture at 2 a.m.
Downstairs practices electric piano all day.
The couple next door fights twenty-four-seven.
Finally I understand why the rent is so cheap.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend stuck in an old apartment building — mutual encouragement until the next lease ends
variations: I don't live in an apartment, I live in a 24/7 reality show. And I'm the one paying for it.

items.sourceNote: 房東報修不回應 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東收房租的速度比 7-11 快取，
回報修的速度比公務員蓋章慢。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給已經報修一個月還沒結果的朋友，告訴他你也一樣
variations: 1號到3號是房東記得我的日子，4號到月底我們互不相識。

en.content:
My landlord collects rent faster than a 7-Eleven self-checkout,
and responds to repair requests slower than the DMV.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who's been waiting a month for a repair — let them know they're not alone
variations: From the 1st to the 3rd, my landlord knows me. From the 4th to month-end, we've never met.

items.sourceNote: 想同居只願出三千 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
他說想跟我同居，
只願意出三千。
我才知道他不是想跟我住，
是想跟我房間住。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給正在被另一半要求同居但只出零頭的朋友，提醒她這不是浪漫，是省錢
variations: 他說「我們住一起省錢」，重點是他省的，我出的。

en.content:
He said he wanted to move in together.
Offered to pay three thousand.
That's when I realized — he didn't want to live with me.
He wanted to live with my room.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose partner suggested cohabiting but only offered pocket change — it's not romance, it's a budget hack
variations: He said 'let's live together to save money.' Turns out he saves, and I pay.

items.sourceNote: 學生越級打怪租房 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
小時候以為長大就可以擁有自己的房子，
長大才發現連自己的房間都是用月薪換來的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合畢業後第一次自己租屋的人轉發，新鮮人剛入社會必有共鳴
variations: 童年夢想是擁有一間有花園的房子，現在的夢想是冷氣費可以少一千。

en.content:
As a kid I thought growing up meant owning a house.
Grown up, I realized even my bedroom is something I rent with my paycheck.
en.editorNote: Perfect for new grads renting their first place — every fresh adult will see themselves in this
variations: Childhood dream: a house with a garden. Current dream: an AC bill a thousand dollars lower.

items.sourceNote: 搬家成本與沉沒成本 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東漲租兩千，我算了一下搬家要花八千，
所以我決定再被剝兩千一年，然後恨他十二個月。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給又被漲租又懶得搬家的朋友，這就是現代版的沉沒成本
variations: 我留下來不是因為愛這個地方，是因為搬家更貴。

en.content:
Landlord raised rent by two thousand. Moving would cost eight thousand.
So I'm being squeezed for another year and hating him for twelve straight months.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who got a rent hike but is too tired to move — modern sunk cost fallacy in action
variations: I'm not staying because I love this place. I'm staying because moving costs more.

items.sourceNote: 情緒房租 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
住外面的人繳房租，
住家裡的人繳情緒房租。
各有各的精彩。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合年底回家被親戚問薪水時用，溫和地回擊「我不只是繳房租，我什麼都繳」
variations: 我朋友月繳一萬五住套房，我月繳零元住家裡，但每天聽八小時心靈廣播。

en.content:
People who live alone pay rent.
People who live with their parents pay emotional rent.
Each has its own special flavor.
en.editorNote: Useful for fielding 'so when are you getting your own place' questions at family gatherings — gentle but pointed
variations: My friend pays $500 a month for a studio. I pay zero to live at home and listen to eight hours of unsolicited advice daily.

items.sourceNote: lease loop renter meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
簽下這份租約那天我以為是一年，
結果是七年。
因為我永遠找不到比這裡更便宜的下一個。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給住同一個地方很多年、明明說要搬卻一直沒搬的朋友——他懂
variations: 我說再租一年就搬，這句話我已經說了五次了。

en.content:
I signed this lease thinking it was for one year.
It's been seven.
Because I'll never find anywhere cheaper than this.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who's been 'about to move' for years now — they'll feel seen
variations: I said 'one more year and I'm moving.' I've said that five years in a row.

items.sourceNote: renter hates landlord meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我理想中的家：陽光、植物、書牆、貓。
我實際的家：插座少、訊號弱、馬桶會自己叫、貓是隔壁的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合搬家當天發文，把幻想跟現實放一起，朋友圈一定按讚
variations: Pinterest 上的家：北歐風。我家:壁癌風。

en.content:
Dream home: sunlight, plants, bookshelves, a cat.
Actual home: not enough outlets, weak signal, a toilet that sings, and the cat belongs to the neighbor.
en.editorNote: Perfect to post on move-in day — pair the fantasy with the reality, guaranteed likes
variations: Pinterest aesthetic: Scandinavian. Mine: 'still has the mold from last tenant.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 租賃法修法 三年租期 漲幅限制; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
新聞說新法要保障房客租三年、限制漲幅。
房東看完，把租約改成兩年十一個月。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在每次租屋政策上新聞時轉發，順便提醒朋友看清楚合約年限
variations: 房東不違法，他只是剛好寫到「未滿三年」。

en.content:
News says the new law guarantees three-year leases with capped rent hikes.
My landlord read it, then quietly changed the contract to two years and eleven months.
en.editorNote: Good to share whenever new tenant-protection laws hit the news — bonus: remind your friends to actually read the lease length
variations: My landlord isn't breaking the law. He just happens to write 'less than three years' on every contract.

items.sourceNote: 房東拒絕租屋補助申請 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我想申請租屋補助，房東說：「可以啊，那房租加兩千。」
所以政府幫我，房東也幫我——幫我把補助送回去。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給準備申請租屋補貼但被房東加價的朋友，順便附上檢舉專線
variations: 補助一萬，房租漲兩千，我感謝房東讓我學會什麼叫淨值。

en.content:
I wanted to apply for the rent subsidy. Landlord said: 'Sure — but rent goes up two thousand.'
The government helps me. My landlord helps me too — helps the subsidy go right back.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend trying to claim the rent subsidy whose landlord just hiked the price — attach the tip-line number for good measure
variations: Subsidy gives me ten thousand. Landlord raises rent by two thousand. He taught me what 'net value' means.

items.sourceNote: 2026 renter meme 水槽哀嚎; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
租屋的浪漫在於：
半夜水龍頭會自己哭，
冰箱會跟你共鳴，
馬桶比室友更會講話。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合老公寓的住戶半夜失眠時發文，那種聲音真的不是錯覺
variations: 我家的家電們組了一個樂團，主唱是冰箱，鼓手是馬桶，吉他手是熱水器。

en.content:
The romance of renting:
The faucet sobs at midnight,
The fridge hums along,
The toilet talks more than your roommate.
en.editorNote: Perfect for old-building renters who can't sleep — those noises are real, not in your head
variations: My appliances formed a band. Lead vocals: the fridge. Drums: the toilet. Guitar: the water heater.

items.sourceNote: 共生雅房 共用空間 痛點; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
共生公寓的「共生」是真的——
你的洗髮精跟室友共生，
你的食物跟蟑螂共生，
你的睡眠跟隔壁的呼聲共生。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛搬進共生公寓的朋友，先預警再陪他渡過第一個月
variations: 我以為共生公寓很潮，住進去才發現潮的是浴室的牆壁。

en.content:
Co-living really means co-living:
Your shampoo lives with your roommate,
Your food lives with the cockroaches,
Your sleep lives with the snoring next door.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend just moving into co-living — warn them first, then hold their hand through month one
variations: I thought co-living would be cool and modern. Turns out the only thing 'moist and modern' is the bathroom wall.

items.sourceNote: 3名目扣押金1萬4 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東退我押金的時候，列了三個項目：
清潔不周、鑰匙少一支、瀝水籃沒還。
我這才知道，原來我租的不是房子，是博物館。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛被房東以奇怪名目扣押金的朋友，附上消保官電話
variations: 押金兩萬，退我六千，剩下一萬四是房東幫我上的「成年人速成班」學費。

en.content:
When my landlord refunded my deposit, he itemized three deductions:
incomplete cleaning, one missing key, and the dish rack I forgot to return.
That's when I realized — I hadn't rented an apartment, I'd rented a museum.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose landlord just invented creative deduction reasons — attach the tenant hotline for backup
variations: Deposit was twenty thousand. Got six thousand back. The other fourteen thousand was tuition for the landlord's crash course in adulthood.

items.sourceNote: 準時交租仍被斷水電 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我每個月一號準時繳房租，
房東每個月二號準時斷我水電。
原來他不是收租，是在跟我玩躲貓貓。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合住到惡房東、月月被斷水電的朋友拿去發限動，順便求救
variations: 我交房租比交作業還勤勞，房東斷我水電比老師退我作業還快。

en.content:
I pay rent on the first of every month, right on time.
My landlord cuts off my water and power on the second, right on time.
Turns out he isn't collecting rent — he's playing hide and seek.
en.editorNote: Perfect for renters dealing with a vindictive landlord — post it as a story and call for backup
variations: I pay rent more reliably than I turned in homework. My landlord cuts off utilities faster than my teacher returned a failing grade.

items.sourceNote: rent portal tipping meme 2026; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
現在連線上繳房租的頁面都跳出來問：
「要不要給房東一點小費？」
我都已經把命給他了，還要小費？
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每次繳房租被手續費坑的朋友轉發，這個世界真的越來越荒謬
variations: 繳房租要手續費，刷卡有點數限制，匯款要帶身分證——房東是不是金融機構？

en.content:
Now even the rent payment page asks:
'Would you like to leave a tip for your landlord?'
I already gave him my soul. He wants a tip too?
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who's been nickel-and-dimed by rent platform fees — the world keeps getting more absurd
variations: Convenience fee to pay rent, points cap on the credit card, ID required to wire transfer — is my landlord a bank now?

items.sourceNote: landlord white paint cover-up meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東說：「房子剛重新粉刷過，很新喔！」
我搬進去三天，白漆下面開始浮出前任房客的人生故事。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛搬進「翻新出租屋」的朋友，提醒他撕壁紙之前先深呼吸
variations: 房東的白漆是 Photoshop 的修圖筆，蓋住了壁癌、塗鴉、跟一段不可告人的歷史。

en.content:
Landlord: 'Freshly repainted, practically new!'
Three days in, the previous tenant's life story starts seeping through the white coat.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just moved into a 'newly renovated' rental — tell them to take a deep breath before peeling anything
variations: A landlord's white paint is Photoshop's healing brush — covering mold, graffiti, and one suspiciously specific stain.

items.sourceNote: bank fraud alert after paying rent meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
繳完房租那一刻，
銀行 APP 跳出來問我：「這筆交易是您本人嗎？」
我也想問自己同一句話。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每月一號繳完房租後發限動，搭配一張被掏空的存款截圖
variations: 銀行說這筆扣款很可疑，我說對啊，可疑到我自己都不敢相信我活得下去。

en.content:
Right after I paid rent,
my banking app asked: 'Was this transaction really you?'
Honestly, I'd like to ask myself the same question.
en.editorNote: Perfect to post on the first of the month — bonus points for screenshotting your gutted balance
variations: Bank flagged the charge as suspicious. I agreed — suspicious that I'm still managing to stay alive.

items.sourceNote: 房東十大惡客行為 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東不住這裡，
但他比我媽更知道我幾點回家、幾點洗澡、幾點點外送。
大概是裝在天花板的不只是煙霧偵測器。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給懷疑房東會偷進房間或裝攝影機的朋友，順便附上 1950 諮詢專線
variations: 房東傳訊息問我「最近水費怎麼這麼高」，我才知道他連我洗幾次澡都記得。

en.content:
My landlord doesn't live here,
but he knows when I get home, when I shower, and when I order delivery — better than my mother does.
The ceiling probably has more than just a smoke detector up there.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who suspects their landlord is snooping or has hidden cameras — attach the tenant rights hotline
variations: Landlord texted asking why my water bill spiked. That's when I realized he tracks how often I shower.

items.sourceNote: tiny apartment listing absurdity; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房仲帶我看「精緻套房」，
打開門我才知道：
床、書桌、廁所、廚房在同一個位置，
而那個位置就是我站的地方。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合看完五坪以下套房的朋友抒發，貼 Threads 一定有人留言「我家也是」
variations: 房仲說「麻雀雖小、五臟俱全」，我說我不是麻雀，我是人。

en.content:
The agent showed me a 'cozy studio.'
I opened the door and realized:
the bed, desk, toilet, and kitchen all share one spot,
and that spot is wherever I happen to be standing.
en.editorNote: Perfect for renters who just toured a sub-150-square-foot studio — post on Threads and watch the 'same' replies roll in
variations: Agent said 'small but everything you need.' I said I'm not a hamster, I'm a person.

items.sourceNote: 租屋糾紛調解 register 2026; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
出社會學的第一件事不是寫履歷，
是怎麼跟房東吵架還能拿回押金。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛畢業要面對人生第一場退租談判的朋友，告訴他這比面試更需要練習
variations: 我大學念了四年，畢業後才發現最該選修的是「房客自救法」。

en.content:
The first thing you learn as an adult isn't how to write a resume.
It's how to argue with your landlord and still get your deposit back.
en.editorNote: Send to a recent grad facing their first move-out negotiation — tell them this needs more practice than any interview
variations: Four years of college, and the class I actually needed was 'Tenant Self-Defense 101.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 雙租補 合租兩人各自申請 viral guide; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我跟室友各自申請了租金補貼，
房東知道後說：「那這樣我也要申請。」
申請什麼？申請我們繼續住下去的耐心。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合剛跟室友研究完雙租補申請、結果被房東發現的朋友互相苦笑
variations: 兩個人合租兩份補助，房東一個人漲了兩次房租，數學真的很公平。

en.content:
My roommate and I each applied for the rent subsidy.
When the landlord found out, he said: 'Then I should apply too.'
Apply for what? For our patience to keep living here.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just figured out the dual subsidy with their roommate — only to have the landlord catch on
variations: Two of us claimed two subsidies. One landlord raised the rent twice. Math really is fair.

items.sourceNote: PTT 老房東換手年輕房東漲租 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
老房東退休那天我以為解脫了，
結果他兒子上任第一件事，
就是把我的房租從一萬二調成一萬八。
原來繼承的不只是房子，還有對房客的審美觀。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給租屋處剛換手給「房二代」的朋友，先預警下一年的漲幅
variations: 老房東說「都是緣分啦」就少收兩千，新房東說「這是市場行情」就多收三千。

en.content:
The day the old landlord retired, I thought I was free.
Then his son took over and the first thing he did
was raise my rent from twelve hundred to eighteen.
Turns out he didn't just inherit the building — he inherited the taste for squeezing tenants.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose rental just got handed down to the 'landlord 2.0' generation — brace them for next year's hike
variations: Old landlord said 'we're like family' and knocked off two hundred. New landlord said 'it's just market rate' and tacked on three hundred.

items.sourceNote: 2026 報稅 房租特別扣除額 房東不肯給收據; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我想申報房租特別扣除額，
跟房東要收據。
房東說：「妳要報稅，我就要報所得，那房租加三千。」
我這才懂——所謂節稅，是看誰先放棄。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每年五月報稅前轉發給準備跟房東談收據的朋友，附上一句「祝你好運」
variations: 我省下的稅，剛好等於房東幫我加的房租。我們互相成全。

en.content:
I wanted to claim the rent tax deduction.
Asked my landlord for a receipt.
He said: 'If you report it, I report income — and rent goes up three thousand.'
That's when I understood: tax saving is just a contest of who gives up first.
en.editorNote: Perfect to forward every May before tax season — for friends about to ask their landlord for a receipt, attach a 'good luck'
variations: The tax I saved exactly equals the rent he raised. We complete each other.

items.sourceNote: 2026 居住轉骨年 四大新制 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
新聞說 2026 是居住轉骨年。
我看完笑了，
因為轉骨的是政策，我還是繳一樣的房租，住一樣的套房，做一樣買不起房的夢。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每次看到「居住正義」相關新聞時轉發，溫和地提醒大家現實沒有變
variations: 政策轉骨、房東轉性、薪水轉漲——三選一，我選相信房東會修水管。

en.content:
The news says 2026 is the year housing finally turns a corner.
I laughed.
Because the policy turned, but I'm paying the same rent, in the same studio, dreaming the same dream I can't afford.
en.editorNote: Good to share whenever 'housing reform' headlines drop — a gentle reminder that nothing's actually changed on the ground
variations: Policy reform, landlord reform, salary reform — pick one. I'll go with believing my landlord will fix the pipes.

items.sourceNote: 2026 提前解約踩雷文 viral discussion; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
簽約那天我看過合約，
退租那天我才知道：
看過跟看懂，是兩個截然不同的境界。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給準備提前解約、發現合約字眼模糊的朋友，順便提醒下一份要逐條問清楚
variations: 合約上寫「雙方協議」，協議的方式是房東開口，我點頭。
我簽約前研究三天，房東退租時用三秒讓我學會什麼叫法律。

en.content:
I read the lease the day I signed it.
I understood the lease the day I tried to move out.
Reading and understanding turn out to be two very different things.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend trying to break a lease early and discovering the fine print — bonus: remind them to interrogate every clause next time
variations: The lease said 'by mutual agreement.' The agreement process was: landlord talks, I nod.
I studied the contract for three days before signing. My landlord taught me what 'law' meant in three seconds at move-out.

items.sourceNote: 2026 違建不得申請300億租金補貼 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
新法說違建不能申請租金補貼。
那我住的頂樓加蓋怎麼辦？
房東說：「沒關係，我幫你寫合約地址是一樓。」
原來在台灣，地址也可以四捨五入。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合住頂加、鐵皮屋、夾層的朋友互傳，配上一張你家窗戶的奇景照
variations: 我住違建，房東給我合法合約，補助說我不存在——三方都很有創意。
違建不能領補助，我才知道我從來不算「住在房子裡」，我只是「住在屋頂上」。

en.content:
The new rule says illegal additions can't qualify for the rent subsidy.
What about my rooftop add-on?
My landlord said: 'Don't worry, I'll just put the first floor as your address on the contract.'
Turns out, in Taiwan, even addresses can be rounded down.
en.editorNote: Perfect for friends living in rooftop shacks, tin-roof rooms, or loft conversions — pair with a photo of your weird window view
variations: I live in an illegal unit, my landlord wrote me a legal contract, the subsidy says I don't exist — three sides, all very creative.
Illegal additions can't claim subsidies. That's when I learned I've never 'lived in a house' — I've just been 'living on a roof.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 recently renovated +$400 meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東換了一個馬桶蓋，說「房子有翻修」，
房租加一千。
我這才知道一個馬桶蓋值十二個月的薪水。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給租屋處被「微改裝」當理由漲租的朋友，互相苦笑這個世界
variations: 房東換了一盞燈泡叫做「全面升級」，我換了一份工作叫做「換湯不換藥」。
翻修的定義是：房東花一百元，房客一年多付一萬二。

en.content:
My landlord replaced one toilet seat, called it a 'renovation,'
and bumped rent by a thousand.
That's when I learned a single toilet seat is worth twelve months of my paycheck.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose landlord used a 'minor upgrade' to justify a rent hike — share a bitter laugh at the absurdity
variations: Landlord swapped one lightbulb and called it 'a complete upgrade.' I swapped my whole job and called it 'same circus, different clowns.'
Renovation means: landlord spends a hundred bucks, tenant pays an extra twelve hundred a year.

items.sourceNote: 2026 Dcard 租屋版找室友 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
找室友的時候我列了三個條件：
不抽菸、不吵架、不偷我的牛奶。
結果三個她都做到了——
因為她從來不在家。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合剛找到理想室友的朋友炫耀，或剛被惡室友氣到的人苦笑
variations: 我跟室友每月分攤房租、水費、電費，跟一段沒有戀愛的婚姻一樣。
好室友的定義：跟你住兩年，你連她長什麼樣子都記不太起來。

en.content:
When I was hunting for a roommate, I listed three deal-breakers:
no smoking, no fighting, no stealing my milk.
She checked all three boxes —
because she's never home.
en.editorNote: Great for someone bragging about their unicorn roommate, or for someone freshly burned by a nightmare one
variations: My roommate and I split rent, water, and electricity each month — like a marriage with none of the romance.
Definition of a good roommate: you've lived together two years and still can't quite picture her face.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租補上線房東反制 漲價合法化 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
打開租屋網才發現，
以前月租八千的小套房，
現在都標註「可申請租補」、月租一萬五。
原來租補不是補我，是補房東的漲幅。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合剛打開 591 嚇到的朋友轉發，附上你看到最離譜的「可租補」標籤
variations: 政府給我五千元補助，房東給我七千元漲幅，我每個月還要倒貼兩千感謝這項德政。
「可申請租屋補貼」這六個字，是 2026 年最貴的廣告標語。

en.content:
Opened the rental site and realized:
the little studio that used to be eight hundred a month
now says 'eligible for rent subsidy' and lists at fifteen hundred.
Turns out the subsidy isn't subsidizing me. It's subsidizing my landlord's price hike.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just opened a rental site and got sticker shock — attach the most ridiculous 'subsidy-eligible' listing you've found
variations: Government gives me five hundred. Landlord raises rent seven hundred. I pay an extra two hundred a month just to thank them both.
'Eligible for rent subsidy' is the most expensive six-word ad copy of 2026.

items.sourceNote: renting summon demon sink noise meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
租屋是一場精彩的遊戲：
你付了一筆天文數字的房租，
然後水槽決定在半夜召喚惡靈。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給住老公寓的朋友，那個聲音不是錯覺，但你也修不起
variations: 我家水管的吟唱比我手機鬧鐘還準時，每天清晨四點半，從不請假。
繳了房租，買了驅魔——這兩件事在租屋族的人生裡，是同一件。

en.content:
Renting is a fun little game:
you pay an astronomical amount of money,
and then your sink decides to summon a demon at 3 a.m.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend in an old apartment — the noise is real, you just can't afford to fix it
variations: My pipes chant more reliably than my phone alarm — every morning at 4:30, no days off.
Pay the rent, pay the exorcist — in a renter's life, these are the same line item.

items.sourceNote: congratulations on having a home afford nothing else meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
恭喜你擁有了一個家。
很遺憾，從此你什麼都買不起了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合剛簽下新租約的朋友轉發，配一張空蕩蕩的冰箱照片更有感
variations: 搬進新家的第一件事是慶祝，第二件事是發現我以後只能吃泡麵慶祝。
有了房子之後，我把「自由」這兩個字寫進辭海，再也用不到。

en.content:
Congratulations on having a home.
Unfortunately, you can now afford absolutely nothing else.
en.editorNote: Perfect for a friend who just signed a new lease — pair it with a photo of their empty fridge for full effect
variations: First thing I did after moving in: celebrate. Second thing: realize the celebration is now ramen, forever.
Once I had a place of my own, I filed the word 'freedom' away in the dictionary and never used it again.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租補不承認頂加 5+6 viral discussion; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我住五樓加蓋的六樓，
租補說我不存在，
房東說我合法，
夏天說我比烤箱熱。
四方說法都不一樣，只有我每天都很實際地醒在這裡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給住頂加的朋友互相苦笑，2026 年「5+6」這個梗值得被記住
variations: 頂加的浪漫：冬天看星星、夏天當烤雞、雨天聽演唱會、補助看不到我。
我家在地圖上不存在，在房東口中存在，在我帳戶餘額上非常存在。

en.content:
I live in the sixth floor that was built on top of the fifth.
The subsidy says I don't exist.
My landlord says I'm legal.
Summer says I'm hotter than an oven.
Four different stories — and I'm the one waking up here every day.
en.editorNote: Send to friends in rooftop add-ons — the 2026 'fifth-floor-plus-six' meme deserves to be remembered
variations: Romance of the rooftop unit: stars in winter, roasting in summer, free concerts in the rain, invisible to the subsidy office.
My apartment doesn't exist on any map, exists in my landlord's mouth, and definitely exists in my bank balance.

items.sourceNote: 2026 雅房室友超噁3行為 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
雅房省下的房租，
剛好等於我每天清室友頭髮、擦鏡子上的牙膏、沖他忘記沖的馬桶所需的心理治療費。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給為了省幾千塊去住雅房、結果天天崩潰的朋友，附上一句「快逃」
variations: 我以為雅房只是房間小，沒想到還附贈一個免費的人類觀察實驗。
省下的兩千塊房租，我花了五千塊買漂白水跟手套。

en.content:
The rent I save by living in a shared room
is exactly what I'd pay in therapy for cleaning his hair off the drain, his toothpaste off the mirror, and the toilet he forgot to flush.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who took a shared room to save a few hundred bucks and is now crying daily — attach a 'get out while you can'
variations: Thought I was just renting a smaller room. Turns out it came with a free, ongoing human behavior study.
Saved two hundred on rent. Spent five hundred on bleach and rubber gloves.

items.sourceNote: 2026 合租室友天天帶男友回家 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我跟室友合租，
後來變成我跟室友、室友的男友合租，
再後來變成我跟室友的男友合租，
因為室友每次都去他家。
我繳的房租，剛好補貼了一段我看不到的戀愛。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給合租被室友男友當第三人佔用空間的朋友，提醒她開家庭會議了
variations: 三個人住兩個人的房子，付兩份房租，我才是那個多出來的。
室友的男友比室友還常出現，我懷疑我才是被借住的那一個。

en.content:
I split rent with my roommate.
Then it became me, my roommate, and her boyfriend.
Then it became me and her boyfriend, because she's always at his place.
My rent is basically subsidizing a relationship I'm not even in.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose roommate's boyfriend has become a permanent installation — time for a house meeting
variations: Three people in a two-person apartment, two people paying rent — I'm the extra one.
Her boyfriend is here more than she is. I'm starting to think I'm the one crashing on someone else's couch.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租屋補助新制全攻略 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
2026 租屋補助新制，文章說「五分鐘看懂」，
我看了五十分鐘還沒申請成功，
房東一秒就把房租漲完。
速度差距，大概就是我跟他財富的差距。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每次政府公告新版租補後、被表格擊潰的朋友轉發，順便交換申請文件清單
variations: 我研究補助條件三天，房東研究漲幅天花板三秒。
新制要附的證明文件比我履歷還長，難怪房東是有資產的人。

en.content:
The 2026 rent subsidy update — the article says 'understand it in five minutes.'
Fifty minutes in, I still haven't filed.
My landlord raised the rent in one second.
That speed gap? Probably the same as the wealth gap between us.
en.editorNote: Perfect for friends who just got crushed by the subsidy application form — trade your document checklists in the replies
variations: I spent three days studying the subsidy rules. My landlord spent three seconds studying the rent cap.
The required paperwork is longer than my resume. No wonder he's the one with assets.

items.sourceNote: 2026 'it's fine' googling tenant rights meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我嘴上一直說：「沒事啦，還可以住。」
手機螢幕上一直在查：「房東不修要怎麼辦」「漏水可以解約嗎」「押金沒退去哪告」。
所謂沒事，就是先壓著沒爆而已。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每天嘴硬說「還住得下去」、瀏覽紀錄卻全是租屋糾紛的朋友，互相承認我們都不太 OK
variations: 我跟朋友說「房東人還可以」，下一秒打開的網頁是「惡房東現形網」。
成年人的崩潰，是一邊微笑說沒事，一邊偷偷查 1950 怎麼撥。

en.content:
Out loud I keep saying: 'It's fine, it's livable.'
On my phone, my search history is: 'landlord won't repair what to do,' 'can leaks break a lease,' 'where to sue for unreturned deposit.'
'Fine' just means I haven't snapped yet.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who insists everything's okay while their browser history screams otherwise — mutual permission to admit we're not fine
variations: Told my friend 'my landlord's actually pretty chill.' Next tab open: 'how to report a bad landlord.'
Adult breakdowns look like smiling and saying 'no problem' while quietly searching how to call the tenant hotline.

items.sourceNote: 2026 噪音管制法 樓上腳步聲 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我每天晚上都會被樓上的腳步聲叫醒，
我以為樓上住的是大象，
結果是一隻五公斤的貴賓狗。
房租十五K，附贈一場永不謝幕的踢踏舞表演。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合住公寓被樓上腳步聲折磨的朋友轉發，順便附上震樓神器的購物連結
variations: 樓上的狗比我還會跳街舞，而我每個月還付錢當牠的觀眾。
我家不是套房，是樓上動物園的VIP觀眾席——含躺椅、含失眠、不含睡眠。

en.content:
Every night I get woken up by the footsteps upstairs.
I assumed it was an elephant.
Turned out to be an eleven-pound poodle.
For five hundred a month, I get a tap-dance show that never ends.
en.editorNote: Send to friends in apartments suffering through upstairs footsteps — feel free to attach a link to a ceiling-thumper device
variations: The dog upstairs has better moves than I do, and I pay rent to watch the show.
I don't live in a studio. I live in the VIP box of the zoo upstairs — recliner included, sleep not included.

items.sourceNote: 2026 market sets the rent four identical landlords meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我問房東為什麼房租要漲，
他說：「市場行情啦。」
我問市場是誰，
他說：「就我跟我朋友。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次被房東以「市場行情」當漲價理由的朋友，這就是台灣版的卡特爾
variations: 「市場行情」是房東們唯一準時開的會，討論的議題只有一個：要漲多少。
他口中的市場是房東群組，我口中的市場是夜市，差別在於夜市還能殺價。

en.content:
I asked my landlord why the rent was going up.
He said: 'That's just the market.'
I asked who the market was.
He said: 'Me and my friends.'
en.editorNote: Send to anyone whose landlord has invoked 'the market' as justification for a hike — it's a cartel with extra steps
variations: 'Market rate' is the only meeting landlords ever attend on time — single agenda item: how much to raise it.
His market is a group chat. Mine is a farmers' market — and at least there I can haggle.

items.sourceNote: PTT 租屋家具陽春 寒酸 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東說「附全套家具」。
我搬進去才發現「全套」的意思是：
一張床、一張椅子、一支沒插頭的吹風機。
剩下三件家具的位置，是要我自己去夢裡領的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛看完「附家具套房」結果家具是空氣的朋友，記得拍照存證
variations: 房東說附家具，我以為是床桌椅，後來發現他指的是「空氣中那些回憶」。
全套家具的全套，原來是省略號的全套：床⋯⋯椅子⋯⋯然後就沒有了。

en.content:
Landlord said: 'Fully furnished.'
Moved in and discovered 'fully' meant:
one bed, one chair, one hair dryer with no plug.
The other three pieces of furniture, I had to collect in my dreams.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just toured a 'furnished' unit only to find ghost furniture — remind them to photograph everything
variations: He said 'furnished.' I expected a bed, a desk, a chair. Turns out he meant 'furnished with memories.'
'Fully furnished' is one of those phrases ending in an ellipsis: a bed... a chair... and that's the list.

items.sourceNote: Dcard 找房月初時間黑洞 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
找房子的時候我給自己一個月。
第三十天我看了一百間，喜歡的有兩間，
一間在我預算的兩倍，一間已經被別人租走了。
我終於懂什麼叫存在主義危機。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每次月初打開 591 從早滑到晚的朋友抒發，這個月也辛苦了
variations: 找房子的時候我只有兩種狀態：在 591 上面滑，跟在 591 上面哭。
我找了一個月的房子，學會了三件事：怎麼看格局、怎麼問房東、怎麼放棄。

en.content:
I gave myself a month to find a place.
Day thirty: toured a hundred apartments, liked two —
one was double my budget, the other was already gone.
Now I finally understand what an existential crisis is.
en.editorNote: Perfect for friends who spend the first of every month scrolling rental sites from dawn to dusk — you survived another round
variations: While apartment hunting I only have two states: scrolling listings, and crying over listings.
A month of apartment hunting taught me three things: how to read a floor plan, how to question a landlord, and how to give up.

items.sourceNote: ETtoday 蟑螂滿地跑兩天想退租 case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我以為我簽的是租約，
後來才發現我是蟑螂的房客，
房東才是牠們的二房東。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合剛搬進「看房時超乾淨」結果半夜開燈嚇到不會動的朋友抒發，記得順便傳一張殺蟲劑團購連結
variations: 看房的時候房間很乾淨，搬進去的第三天我才發現乾淨是因為蟑螂全部躲起來在觀察我。
房東說這間沒有蟲，那一定是把蟑螂算進附贈家電裡面了。

en.content:
I thought I signed a lease.
Turns out I'm just subletting from the cockroaches,
and the landlord is their middleman.
en.editorNote: For the friend who just moved into a 'spotless' viewing apartment and now freezes every time they flip on the kitchen light at 2am — pair with a group-buy link for roach spray
variations: The place looked clean during the viewing. By day three I realized it was clean because every roach was hiding, scouting me out.
The landlord swore there were no bugs. He must've listed the cockroaches under 'included appliances.'

items.sourceNote: PTT 退租三個月房東不退押金; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
押金是這樣的東西：
你交出去的時候叫押金，
你拿回來的時候叫奇蹟。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給已經追了房東三個月還沒拿到押金的朋友，順便提醒他下次簽約把退押金期限白紙黑字寫進去
variations: 退租三個月了，房東說押金「再等一下」，再等下去我就要過生日了。
我跟房東現在的關係，跟我跟前任一樣——錢還沒還清，人就不讀不回。

en.content:
Here's the thing about a security deposit:
when you hand it over, it's called a deposit.
When you get it back, it's called a miracle.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who's been chasing their landlord for three months and still hasn't seen a cent — reminder to put deposit-return deadlines in the next lease
variations: Moved out three months ago. Landlord keeps saying 'a little longer.' At this rate I'll be a year older before I see that money.
My relationship with my landlord is exactly like my relationship with my ex — money still owed, messages left on read.

items.sourceNote: Dcard 蟑螂屋退租崩潰; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我跟房東說天花板在漏水。
他說：「下雨才會漏，沒下雨就不會漏，所以沒問題。」
喔，原來在台灣不會下雨。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合貼在租屋處天花板那塊黃黃的壁癌旁邊拍照發限動，配文「房東說沒事」
variations: 壁癌是房東給的紀念品，每年一片，集滿十片可以續約。
報修一個月了，房東說他在「找師傅」，我懷疑他是在找借口。

en.content:
Told my landlord the ceiling was leaking.
He said, 'It only leaks when it rains. So no rain, no leak — no problem.'
Oh. Guess it never rains in Taiwan.
en.editorNote: Snap a photo next to that yellow water stain on your ceiling and post it to your story with the caption 'landlord says it's fine'
variations: Mold patches are a souvenir my landlord gives out — one a year, collect ten to renew the lease.
Reported the leak a month ago. Landlord says he's 'finding a repair guy.' I think he's finding an excuse.

items.sourceNote: 果仁家 租屋看房注意事項 15大重點; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房仲說「機能很好、生活便利」，
意思是樓下是夜市、隔壁是宮廟、對面是國中。
三點起床的選擇有：宵夜、誦經、跟早自習。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給正在被房仲洗腦「這個價錢在這個地段你找不到了」的朋友，提醒他先去現場待一個晚上
variations: 房仲嘴裡的「採光好」翻譯過來叫「晚上路燈會直接照進你床上」。
「格局方正」是房仲對「沒有窗戶」最溫柔的形容方式。

en.content:
The agent said 'great location, super convenient.'
Translation: night market downstairs, temple next door, junior high across the street.
Your 3am options: late-night snack, sutra chanting, or morning roll call.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend being love-bombed by an agent insisting 'you won't find this price in this area' — tell them to spend one night on-site first
variations: When an agent says 'great natural light,' they mean the street lamp shines directly onto your pillow at night.
'Well-proportioned layout' is the gentlest way an agent can say 'no windows.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 租屋電費新制 一度5元爭議; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東一度電收我六塊半。
我問他依據是什麼，
他說：「我家的電比較貴。」
喔，原來你家的電是從喜馬拉雅山運下來的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每個夏天看到電費單就想哭的朋友，順便附上 2026 租屋電費新制連結，請房東照法規收費
variations: 夏天的電費比房租還貴，我現在開冷氣的勇氣，只夠我看一眼帳單就關掉。
房東說「電費實支實收」，後來才發現他指的是「實際支付，他實際收下」。

en.content:
My landlord charges me twenty cents per kilowatt-hour.
I asked him for the basis.
He said: 'The electricity at my place is just more expensive.'
Oh — I didn't realize you imported yours from the Himalayas.
en.editorNote: Send to friends who weep every summer at the power bill — attach the 2026 rental electricity rules and politely demand legal pricing
variations: Summer power bills cost more than rent. The courage I need to turn on the AC barely lasts long enough to glance at the bill and shut it off.
Landlord said 'electricity is billed at cost.' Turns out the cost is whatever he says, and the billing is whatever I pay.

items.sourceNote: Dcard 隔音差套房 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我的套房隔音很好。
好到我能聽見隔壁吹頭髮、沖馬桶、跟女友吵架的全套劇情，
還能聽見對面那間的男生跟我同步看完一整集八點檔。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給住在「電梯大樓但牆壁像紙糊」的朋友，順便提醒他下次看房記得敲牆壁
variations: 我跟隔壁鄰居沒講過話，但我知道他每天幾點起床、幾點上廁所、幾點分手。
房仲說的「隔音良好」，意思是聽得到聲音但聽不到內容——但我兩個都聽得到。

en.content:
My studio has excellent soundproofing.
So good I can hear the neighbor's hair dryer, toilet flush, and full-volume fight with his girlfriend,
plus the guy across the hall watching the same drama episode in perfect sync with me.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend in an 'elevator building' with paper walls — remind them to knock on the walls during the next viewing
variations: I've never spoken to my neighbor, but I know exactly when he wakes up, when he uses the bathroom, and when he breaks up.
'Good soundproofing' is supposed to mean you hear sound but not words. In my place I get both.

items.sourceNote: 二房東 包水電 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我以為簽約對象是房東。
後來才知道他是二房東，
二房東上面還有大房東，
大房東上面還有銀行，
而我只是這條食物鏈最下面那個按時繳錢的浮游生物。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給簽約前沒問清楚對方身分的朋友，下次記得請對方出示房屋謄本或原始租約
variations: 二房東的工作就是：什麼都不做，每個月準時收我的錢，再分一點給大房東。
我以為我在租房子，後來才發現我是這間房子的第三手代理付款人。

en.content:
I thought I was signing with the landlord.
Then I found out he was the sub-landlord,
above him was the real landlord,
above the real landlord was the bank,
and I'm just the plankton at the bottom of this food chain, paying on time every month.
en.editorNote: Send to anyone who signed without verifying the other side — next time, ask to see the deed or the original lease
variations: A sub-landlord's full-time job: do nothing, collect my rent on time, then forward a slice to the real landlord.
I thought I was renting an apartment. Turns out I'm just the third-party autopay on someone else's mortgage.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租屋報稅 房東不給報 case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我問房東能不能報稅，
他說：「可以啊，但租金要漲。」
我說那不用了，
他說：「好，那合約上的金額也不要寫了。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每年五月被房東威脅「報稅就漲租」的朋友抒發，順便提醒對方租金支出列舉扣除其實是你的權利
variations: 房東說可以報稅，前提是我假裝沒住在這裡。
報稅季的房東變得跟前任一樣神秘——你只要提到錢，他就不讀不回。

en.content:
I asked my landlord if I could claim the rent on my taxes.
He said, 'Sure — but the rent goes up.'
I said never mind.
He said, 'Great, and let's not write that number on the lease either.'
en.editorNote: Send to every friend who gets the annual May threat of 'claim it and I'll raise the rent' — gentle reminder that the rent deduction is legally yours
variations: Landlord said I'm welcome to claim the rent, as long as I pretend I don't actually live here.
Come tax season, landlords get as mysterious as your ex — mention money once and they leave you on read.

items.sourceNote: 2026 房東以租補名義反制漲租 新聞; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
政府發八千租補，
房東就漲一萬。
我不是領到補助，
我是順便幫房東加薪。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合剛收到房東「因應市場行情」漲租通知的朋友，順便提醒對方房東不得因申請補貼漲租，違者最高罰五十萬
variations: 租補一公布，全社區房東開會的速度比工會還快。
我以為政府是要幫我，後來才發現政府只是幫我把錢交給房東的中間人。

en.content:
The government hands out an eight-grand rent subsidy.
The landlord raises rent by ten.
I didn't get a subsidy.
I just helped my landlord get a raise.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just got a 'market adjustment' rent hike — quick reminder that retaliating against subsidy applicants is illegal and fineable
variations: The day the subsidy was announced, every landlord in my building organized faster than any union ever could.
Turns out the government isn't helping me — it's just the middleman wiring my money to my landlord.

items.sourceNote: 房東不退押金 自保 case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
退租那天房東繞了房子三圈，
第一圈找牆上的痕跡，
第二圈找地板的刮傷，
第三圈在想還能扣我什麼。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合搬家前一週的朋友抒發，記得入住第一天拍滿整間照片、退租當天再拍一次，押金才有機會原封不動回家
variations: 房東驗屋的眼神，比我媽看我考卷還認真。
退租點交不是儀式，是房東把押金合法私吞的最後一道手續。

en.content:
Move-out day, the landlord circled the apartment three times.
First lap: scuffs on the walls.
Second lap: scratches on the floor.
Third lap: trying to invent something else to deduct.
en.editorNote: Good vent for friends a week from moving out — remind them to photograph everything on day one AND day last if they want that deposit back intact
variations: My landlord inspects the apartment with more focus than my mom inspecting my report card.
Move-out inspection isn't a ceremony. It's the legal ritual landlords use to keep your deposit.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租賃條例修法 房客權益 article; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
新法上路那天，
我房東傳訊息說：
「我們改用口頭約定好嗎？」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給對租賃修法一知半解的朋友，提醒對方不管房東說什麼，書面合約一定要簽、最好還要拍照備份
variations: 修法越保護房客，房東就越喜歡「我們是朋友啦不用寫合約」這句話。
房東說新法他看不懂，但漲租的部分他第一個學會。

en.content:
The day the new tenant law took effect,
my landlord texted:
'How about we just go with a verbal agreement from now on?'
en.editorNote: Send to friends who only half-read the new rental amendments — remind them to insist on a written lease and keep a photo backup, no matter how friendly the landlord acts
variations: The more the law protects tenants, the more landlords love the phrase 'we're friends, no need for a contract.'
My landlord says the new law is confusing, but he learned the rent-hike section first.

items.sourceNote: 2026 全美房租下跌 但我這間沒跌 對比; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
新聞說全國房租在跌，
我房東說我們這條巷子是例外。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每年看到「房租下修」新聞就傳給房東結果被已讀不回的朋友共鳴
variations: 房租下跌的城市永遠在別人那裡，跟瘦下來的同學一樣。
全國均價跌百分之三，我家漲百分之八，這就是我家的市場地位。

en.content:
The news says rents are falling nationwide.
My landlord says our block is the exception.
en.editorNote: Perfect for anyone who forwards 'rent prices dropping' headlines to their landlord every year and gets left on read
variations: The cities with falling rent always belong to other people, like classmates who lost weight.
National average down 3%, mine up 8% — that's just my building's special market position.

items.sourceNote: Dcard 提前退租 押金 提問; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
提前解約要賠一個月，
繼續住下去要忍十一個月，
搬走要花兩萬，
不搬要哭三百六十五天，
這就是大人的選擇題。
zh-tw.editorNote: 送給正在猶豫要不要硬撐到約滿的朋友，順便提醒對方依規定違約金最多就是一個月租金，不能被多扣
variations: 成年人的自由就是：花錢提前解約，或花心情慢慢住完。
房東說提前走要扣兩個月，我說法律寫一個月，他就突然開始講人情。

en.content:
Break the lease early: pay one month.
Stay: endure eleven more.
Move out: spend two grand.
Stay put: cry for three hundred and sixty-five days.
Welcome to adult multiple choice.
en.editorNote: For friends weighing whether to tough it out till the lease ends — remind them the legal cap on early-termination penalty is one month's rent, no more
variations: Adult freedom: pay money to leave early, or pay with your sanity to finish the lease.
Landlord said breaking the lease costs two months. I quoted the law saying one. Suddenly he wanted to 'talk it out as friends.'

items.sourceNote: ETtoday 房東14年沒聯絡 租金凍漲 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我朋友租屋十四年，房東一次都沒聯絡，租金也沒漲。
我才租兩年，房東已經傳了三百則訊息，漲了四次房租。
原來「房東佛系不佛系」，比星座還準。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次抱怨房東很煩的朋友，提醒他這個世界上真的有不存在感的房東，只是輪不到我們
variations: 別人家房東十四年沒消息，我家房東十四秒已讀我訊息然後再傳一張電費單。
佛系房東是都市傳說，跟「上班不會被打擾」一樣，只存在於別人身上。

en.content:
My friend has rented the same place for fourteen years. Her landlord has never contacted her once, and the rent has never gone up.
I've been renting for two years. My landlord has sent three hundred messages and raised the rent four times.
Turns out 'chill landlord vs. clingy landlord' is more reliable than astrology.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend constantly venting about their landlord — gentle reminder that ghost landlords exist, just never for us
variations: Other people's landlords disappear for fourteen years. Mine read-receipts me in fourteen seconds and follows up with an electricity bill.
A chill landlord is an urban legend, just like 'a workday with no interruptions.' Only happens to other people.

items.sourceNote: ETtoday 瞞凶宅10年 租金倍漲 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
住了十年我才從鄰居口中知道這是凶宅。
房東隱瞞了一整段歷史，卻沒隱瞞任何一次漲租。
他誠實的部分，剛好都對他有利。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給準備簽長約的朋友，提醒對方先查 unluckyhouse 等凶宅資料庫，必要時要求合約寫上「非凶宅」
variations: 房東說「住這麼久都沒事啊」，我說「沒事的是你，不是我」。
凶宅可以隱瞞，房租不能少收——這就是房東的選擇性透明。

en.content:
I lived there ten years before a neighbor casually mentioned it was a stigmatized property.
My landlord hid an entire history, but never hid a single rent hike.
His honesty conveniently kicks in only when it benefits him.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend about to sign a long lease — remind them to check stigmatized-property databases and ask for a 'not a death property' clause in writing
variations: Landlord said, 'You've lived here this long and nothing happened, right?' I said, 'Nothing happened to you. I'm a different story.'
Death properties can stay hidden. Rent hikes never can. That's a landlord's selective transparency.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租賃條例修法 房東反擊 卡關 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
新法說房客最短租三年、漲幅有上限、不能拒絕設籍報稅。
房東看完，把房子下架兩個月，重新貼上：「短租歡迎、不可設籍、市場行情。」
上有政策，他下有貼文。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每次「居住正義」修法消息一出就被打回原形的朋友轉發，提醒大家政策有了，房東的創意也有了
variations: 政府說三年保障，房東說兩年十一個月剛好。
新法保護房客的速度，永遠追不上房東改合約的速度。

en.content:
The new law says tenants get a three-year minimum lease, capped rent hikes, and the right to register their address and claim taxes.
My landlord pulled the listing for two months and reposted it as: 'Short-term welcome. No address registration. Market rate.'
The government sets the policy. He sets the post.
en.editorNote: Send whenever 'housing justice' reform makes the news and immediately gets neutralized — the policy moves, but the landlord's creativity moves faster
variations: Government says three-year protection. Landlord says two years and eleven months is the perfect length.
New laws protect tenants. They will never out-update a landlord rewriting the lease.

items.sourceNote: 2026 surprise inspection meme 突襲驗屋; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東傳訊息：「明天下午我會去看一下房子，看一下就好。」
隔天他帶著手電筒、捲尺、跟一個我不認識的人，看了三個小時。
所謂「看一下」，是房東與時間的個人關係。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次被房東突襲驗屋的朋友，提醒他依法房東進入要事前通知並徵得同意，並非他想來就來
variations: 房東的「順便看一下」跟我媽的「順便煮一點」是同一個量詞。
他說只看廚房，結果連我的抽屜都打開——「不好意思我以為這也是廚房的延伸」。

en.content:
Landlord texted: 'I'll swing by tomorrow afternoon, just a quick look.'
Next day he showed up with a flashlight, a tape measure, and a stranger I'd never seen — and stayed three hours.
'A quick look' apparently means something very specific in landlord time.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend ambushed by a 'quick inspection' — remind them landlords are legally required to give notice and get consent, not just show up
variations: A landlord's 'just a quick peek' uses the same unit of measurement as my mom's 'just a little snack.'
He said he'd only check the kitchen. He opened my drawers. 'Sorry, I thought this counted as kitchen-adjacent.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 Q1 六都租賃實登3.4萬筆 年增近2成 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
新聞說 Q1 六都租賃實登成長兩成，
意思是更多人放棄了買房的夢，加入了我們繳房租的隊伍。
歡迎光臨，這裡沒有未來，但有 Wi-Fi。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合年初看完購屋新聞、決定再租一年的朋友，附上一張你套房的雜亂全景照
variations: 買房的人越來越少，租房的人越來越多，房東的笑容越來越燦爛。
我這代人的成年禮不是買房，是學會把月租分成十二期跟自己的未來討價還價。

en.content:
News says rental contracts in the six metros are up twenty percent this quarter.
Translation: more people gave up on owning a home and joined us in the rent-paying queue.
Welcome aboard. There's no future here, but the Wi-Fi works.
en.editorNote: Perfect for friends who just read another 'home ownership at a record low' headline and decided to renew the lease — pair with a wide shot of your messy studio
variations: Fewer people buying, more people renting, landlords smiling wider every quarter.
My generation's rite of passage isn't buying a home. It's learning to split monthly rent into twelve installments of arguing with your own future.

items.sourceNote: 2026 偷養貓房東反而加條款 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我偷養貓兩年，房東來驗屋的那天我比貓還緊張。
結果他蹲下來摸了摸貓，說：「下次提早講嘛。」
那一刻我才知道——我怕的不是房東，是我自己編了兩年的謊。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每個正在偷養寵物、每次房東傳訊息就心跳到一百八的朋友，順便提醒他寵物條款可以加註、不一定要躲一輩子
variations: 貓躲在櫃子裡，我躲在謊言裡，房東一進門我們兩個一起冒汗。
養貓的成本：飼料一個月一千、砂盆一個月五百、被房東發現的恐懼一個月無價。

en.content:
I secretly kept a cat for two years. The day the landlord came to inspect, I was more nervous than the cat.
He crouched down, scratched her chin, and said: 'Just tell me next time.'
That's when I realized — I wasn't scared of him. I was scared of the lie I'd been maintaining for two years.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend secretly keeping a pet whose heart rate spikes every time the landlord texts — bonus reminder that a pet clause is a thing, you don't have to hide forever
variations: Cat hides in the closet. I hide behind the lie. Landlord walks in and we both start sweating.
Cost of keeping a cat: thirty bucks of food, fifteen bucks of litter, and the priceless monthly dread that the landlord will find out.

items.sourceNote: 2026 點交清潔費爭議 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
退租前我打掃了八小時，地板擦到能照鏡子。
房東驗屋說：「還是不夠乾淨喔，清潔費扣三千。」
我這才明白——所謂清潔費，跟乾不乾淨沒關係，跟他想不想退我押金有關係。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合搬家前一週的朋友抒發，順便提醒對方依法清潔費要事先白紙黑字寫進合約，沒寫的不能臨時加
variations: 我擦地三小時，房東看一秒，扣三千。時薪換算下來，這份「清潔工作」我虧大了。
房東的乾淨標準是「比新房子還新」，我的乾淨標準是「比我搬進來時還乾淨」。我們從來沒有共識。

en.content:
I cleaned for eight hours before moving out — the floor was a mirror.
Landlord inspected and said: 'Still not clean enough. Three hundred bucks off your deposit.'
That's when I understood: a cleaning fee has nothing to do with how clean it is, and everything to do with whether he wants to give your deposit back.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend a week out from moving — remind them cleaning fees have to be written into the lease in advance, no surprise add-ons at move-out
variations: Three hours of mopping, one second of inspection, three hundred bucks gone. The hourly rate on this cleaning gig was a loss.
His standard of clean is 'newer than new construction.' Mine is 'cleaner than the day I moved in.' We've never agreed on anything.

items.sourceNote: 2026 房客最後兩個月用押金抵房租 PTT 爭議 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
朋友勸我退租前兩個月不要繳房租，直接讓房東「用押金抵」。
我說那不就是不退我押金嗎？
他說對啊，但你至少能確定他真的「沒退你」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每個聽過「最後兩個月用押金抵」這個都市傳說的朋友，提醒對方這在合約上其實是違約，但很多人寧願違約也不想被坑
variations: 成年人的智慧：與其等房東退押金，不如自己先扣下來。
我跟房東的信任，建立在「我們都假裝對方會守規矩」這件事上。

en.content:
A friend told me to skip the last two months of rent and let the landlord 'just use the deposit.'
I said, isn't that the same as him not returning it?
He said, yeah, but at least you'll know for sure he didn't.
en.editorNote: Send to anyone who's heard the urban legend of 'use the deposit for the last two months' — technically a breach of contract, but plenty of renters would rather breach than get burned
variations: Adult wisdom: instead of waiting for the deposit, deduct it yourself first.
The trust between me and my landlord is built on both of us pretending the other will play by the rules.

items.sourceNote: 2026 颱風天租屋停電房東不修 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
颱風天停電，我傳訊息給房東。
他說：「停電是天災，不是我的責任。」
我說那雨從窗戶縫滲進來呢？
他說：「那是窗戶的問題，也不是我的責任。」
我懂了——這間房子的責任歸屬，全部都在我頭上。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給颱風天還要自己處理漏水、停電、淹水的朋友互相打氣，記得錄影存證，房屋結構修繕本來就是房東的責任
variations: 颱風天我才發現，跟我同居的不是男友，是漏水。
房東說颱風是天災，我說颱風來了你都不來，那房租也算天災嗎？

en.content:
Typhoon day, the power went out. I messaged my landlord.
He said: 'Blackouts are an act of God. Not my problem.'
I said, what about the rain leaking through the window?
He said: 'That's a window problem. Also not my problem.'
I got it — in this apartment, everything is somehow my responsibility.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend dealing with leaks, blackouts, or flooding alone during a typhoon — record everything for evidence, structural repairs are legally the landlord's job
variations: Typhoon day taught me I'm not living with my boyfriend. I'm living with a leak.
Landlord says typhoons are acts of God. I say if you don't show up when a typhoon hits, does the rent count as an act of God too?

items.sourceNote: 2026 看房一進門狗在沙發上 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我去看房，房東打開門那一刻，
沙發上躺著一隻狗、一個前房客、跟一張沒收走的外送單。
房東笑著說：「我們今天剛打掃完。」
我才知道台灣的「剛打掃完」是一個多麼浪漫的時間概念。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次看房現場跟照片落差五公里的朋友，提醒對方拍照存證並當場確認哪些可以改善
variations: 591 的照片是房東的拍立得修圖，現場的房子是我手機的原相機。
房仲說「現在這個狀況是因為前房客還沒搬走」，我說那你下次拍照前先請他搬走啊。

en.content:
I went to view an apartment. The landlord opened the door and inside was:
a dog on the couch, the previous tenant on the couch, and a takeout receipt nobody bothered to clear.
Landlord smiled and said: 'We just finished cleaning.'
That's when I learned how romantic the phrase 'just cleaned' is in Taiwan.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose viewings keep landing five kilometers from the listing photos — tell them to document everything and confirm fixes on the spot
variations: Listing photos are the landlord's filtered Polaroid. The actual unit is my phone's raw camera.
Agent said 'this is just because the last tenant hasn't moved out yet.' I said, then maybe ask him to move out before the next photo shoot.

items.sourceNote: 看房簽約後才發現停車位另計 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東報的「月租八千」是基本款，
後來才知道：管理費另計、網路另計、停車另計、停車場的鑰匙也另計。
原來八千只是入場費，不是套票。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛簽約才發現各種「另計」費用的朋友，提醒下次看房先把所有費用問到底
variations: 房東說「水電全包」，包的是他自己的，我的還是要繳。
我以為租金是全部，後來才知道那只是訂閱制的第一層方案。

en.content:
The landlord quoted 'eight hundred a month' as the base plan.
Later I learned: management fee extra, internet extra, parking extra, and the key to the parking lot also extra.
Turns out eight hundred was just the cover charge, not the full ticket.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just signed and discovered all the 'extra' fees — a reminder to interrogate every cost next time
variations: Landlord said 'utilities included.' His were. Mine I still pay for.
I thought rent was the whole thing. Turns out it was just tier one of the subscription.

items.sourceNote: 搬家紙箱沉沒成本 厭世 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
這次搬家我打包了二十個紙箱，
其中有十二個，是上次搬家就沒拆過的。
我搬的不是家，是一個帶著走的倉庫。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次搬家都在懷疑自己為什麼東西這麼多的朋友，搬家當天最有共鳴
variations: 我以為我在搬家，其實我只是在換一個地方堆我捨不得丟的東西。
搬家三次才明白：真正的斷捨離，是房東幫你決定的。

en.content:
This move I packed twenty boxes.
Twelve of them I never unpacked from the last move.
I'm not moving a home, I'm moving a storage unit that follows me around.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who questions why they own so much stuff every single move — peak relatability on moving day
variations: I thought I was moving out. Really I'm just relocating the pile of things I can't bring myself to throw away.
Three moves in, I finally get it: real decluttering is the kind your landlord decides for you.

items.sourceNote: 頂樓加蓋夏天悶熱 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
住頂樓加蓋的好處是離天空很近，
壞處是夏天的時候，天空也離地獄很近。
我家的室溫，是房東省下來的良心溫度。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合住頂加、鐵皮屋、夏天開冷氣也救不回來的朋友互傳，配一張室溫計照片
variations: 別人說頂樓視野好，我說頂樓視野好到可以看著電費直直往上飆。
頂加的夏天，是房東幫你免費安排的桑拿，還附贈每個月的電費帳單。

en.content:
The upside of living in a rooftop add-on is you're close to the sky.
The downside is that in summer, the sky is also close to hell.
The temperature in my place is the exact amount of conscience my landlord decided to save on.
en.editorNote: Perfect for friends in rooftop shacks or tin-roof rooms that the AC can't save in summer — pair with a photo of the thermometer
variations: People say rooftops have a great view. Mine has a view great enough to watch the electric bill climb straight up.
Summer in a rooftop add-on is a free sauna courtesy of your landlord, electric bill included every month.

items.sourceNote: 房東突襲看房不預約 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東說要帶下一個房客來看房，
沒預約、沒敲門，鑰匙直接轉開。
我才知道——我租的不是房間，是一個有別人鑰匙的空間。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給被房東突襲看房嚇到的朋友，順便提醒他合約裡有「進入需事先通知」這條
variations: 房東說「這是我的房子」，我說「但這個月是我的隱私」。
我退租前一週，房東帶看房的次數比我交的女朋友還多。

en.content:
My landlord said he'd bring the next tenant by for a showing.
No appointment, no knock — just turned the key and walked in.
That's when I realized: I'm not renting a room, I'm renting a space someone else has a key to.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend ambushed by a surprise showing — remind them their lease likely has an 'advance notice to enter' clause
variations: Landlord said 'it's my house.' I said 'but this month it's my privacy.'
In the week before I moved out, my landlord ran more showings than I've had relationships.

items.sourceNote: 押金不得扣清潔費油漆費 法律盲點 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
退租那天房東從押金扣了清潔費、油漆費、還有一條「折舊費」。
我查了法律才知道，這些根本不能扣。
原來最該折舊的，是我對房東的信任。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛被房東亂扣押金的朋友，提醒他清潔、油漆這些沒寫進合約其實不能扣，必要時打1950
variations: 房東說押金要扣「正常損耗」，我說那我這一年被你氣老的部分，可不可以也算進去。
押金兩個月是法律上限，房東收三個月還理直氣壯，我才懂什麼叫先學會吃虧再學會法律。

en.content:
On move-out day my landlord deducted cleaning, repainting, and something he called a 'depreciation fee.'
I looked up the law — none of that is allowed.
Turns out the thing that depreciated most was my trust in him.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just got hit with bogus deposit deductions — remind them cleaning and repainting can't be charged unless it's in the contract, and the tenant hotline exists for a reason
variations: Landlord said the deposit covers 'normal wear and tear.' Can the year I aged from arguing with him count too?
Two months is the legal cap on a deposit. Mine charged three and didn't blink — that's how you learn to get burned before you learn the law.

items.sourceNote: 2026 工作變動提前解約 違約金一個月上限 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
公司把我調到外縣市，
我跟房東說要提前解約，
他開口就要賠三個月房租。
我查了定型化契約才知道，上限是一個月——
原來房東的數學，從來不打算讓我贏。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給因為工作或唸書要提前解約的朋友，提醒他內政部定型化契約違約金上限是一個月租金，別被嚇到
variations: 我沒住滿一年要賠錢，住滿一年想搬還是要賠錢——原來這份合約只有房東會贏。
房東說提前解約「賠多少看良心」，我說那你良心多少錢一斤。

en.content:
My company transferred me to another city.
I told my landlord I needed to break the lease early.
First thing out of his mouth: three months' rent in penalties.
Then I read the standard contract rules — the cap is one month.
Turns out his math was never going to let me win.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend breaking a lease early for work or school — remind them the standard-contract penalty cap is one month's rent, so don't get bullied
variations: Move out before a year and I pay a penalty. Stay a full year and want to leave — still a penalty. This contract only has one winner.
Landlord said the early-termination fee was 'however much my conscience says.' I asked how much his conscience goes for per pound.

items.sourceNote: 押金不得超過2個月 房東違法多收 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東說：「我們這邊押金都收三個月，行情啦。」
我說：「法律寫上限兩個月。」
他說：「那你可以不要租啊。」
我才懂，所謂行情，就是大家一起被欺負久了的平均值。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合看房時被房東獅子大開口收三個月押金的朋友轉發，附上法律百科連結壯膽
variations: 房東收押金像在募款，理由一個比一個有創意，金額一個比一個沒下限。
「行情」這兩個字，是台灣租屋市場最貴的兩個字。

en.content:
Landlord: 'Around here we take three months' deposit — that's the going rate.'
Me: 'The law caps it at two.'
Him: 'Then don't rent it.'
That's when I got it — 'the going rate' just means the average of everyone getting pushed around for long enough.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose landlord demanded three months' deposit at a viewing — attach a link to the actual rule for backup
variations: My landlord collects deposits like he's running a fundraiser — each reason more creative, each number with less of a floor.
'Market rate' might be the two most expensive words in the whole rental game.

items.sourceNote: 2026 sink unfixed rent raised at worst time meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我的水槽壞了三個月，房東說「再看看」。
上個月我加薪，房東隔天就說「房子也該漲了」。
他對我的薪水比對我的水槽還上心。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給報修石沉大海、漲租卻光速到位的朋友，這就是房東的雙標物理學
variations: 房東修水管的速度是地質年代，漲房租的速度是光速，這兩件事居然能在同一個人身上發生。
我家的水槽跟房東一樣——只在收錢的時候才會通。

en.content:
My sink's been broken for three months. Landlord says 'we'll see.'
Last month I got a raise. Next day he said 'the rent's due for an increase too.'
He pays closer attention to my paycheck than to my plumbing.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose repair requests vanish into the void while rent hikes arrive at light speed — the double-standard physics of landlords
variations: My landlord fixes pipes on a geological timescale and raises rent at the speed of light — somehow both live in the same person.
My sink is just like my landlord: it only runs when money's involved.

items.sourceNote: landlord special renovation rent hike meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東口中的「全新裝潢」，
是把牆刷白、換一個門把、再貼一張新的地墊。
然後房租漲三千，他叫這個「房東特餐」。
我點的明明是套餐，端上來的是空盤加帳單。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給租屋處被「微翻新」當藉口漲租的朋友，一起見證房東的創意料理
variations: 房東特餐的內容是：表面升級一成，價格升級三成，服務升級負十成。
他說裝潢全面升級，我看了半天，只有房租真的升級了。

en.content:
When my landlord says 'fully renovated,'
he means a coat of white paint, a new door handle, and a fresh doormat.
Then rent jumps three hundred and he calls it the 'landlord special.'
I ordered the combo meal — what arrived was an empty plate and a bill.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose landlord used a 'minor refresh' to justify a rent hike — witness the landlord's signature dish together
variations: The landlord special: surface upgraded ten percent, price upgraded thirty, service upgraded negative ten.
He said the place got a full upgrade. I looked everywhere — the only thing that actually upgraded was the rent.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租補變相助長漲租 房東加價比補助多 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
政府發我五千租金補貼，
房東聽到的版本是「政府發我七千漲租許可」。
我們聽的是同一則新聞，
他翻譯成台幣的能力比我強太多了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合剛申請到租補、轉頭就被房東加價的朋友轉發，配上你的補助核定通知截圖
variations: 補助是政府給房客的，漲租是房東給房客的，最後拿到手的還是房東。
我以為租補是來救我的，沒想到它是來通知房東「這位房客有預算」的。

en.content:
The government gave me a five-thousand rent subsidy.
What my landlord heard was 'the government gave me a permit to raise rent by seven.'
We read the same news article.
He's just far better at translating it into cash than I am.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just got approved for the subsidy and immediately got hit with a hike — pair it with your approval-notice screenshot
variations: The subsidy goes from the government to the tenant, the hike goes from the landlord to the tenant, and somehow it all ends up with the landlord.
I thought the subsidy was here to save me. Turns out it was here to tell my landlord 'this one has a budget.'

items.sourceNote: 租屋修繕 換燈泡熱水器誰負責 民法爭議 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
熱水器壞了，我問房東誰負責修，
他說「先看是誰用壞的」。
房子三十年，熱水器二十年，我住了八個月，
但壞掉的責任，永遠是最後一個開的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給正在跟房東爭論修繕責任的朋友，提醒他民法上自然耗損本來就是房東要修
variations: 房東的邏輯：會漏水是房子老，要修水管是我手賤。
東西用二十年壞掉叫「天命」，我用八個月壞掉叫「人禍」，這台熱水器很懂政治。

en.content:
The water heater died. I asked my landlord who pays to fix it.
He said, 'First let's figure out who broke it.'
The building's thirty years old, the heater's twenty, and I've lived here eight months —
but somehow the blame always lands on whoever turned it on last.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend arguing repair liability with their landlord — remind them that normal wear and tear is legally the landlord's problem
variations: Landlord logic: a leak is the building being old, but fixing the pipes is me being careless.
Something breaking after twenty years is 'fate.' Me breaking it in eight months is 'human error.' This water heater really understands politics.

items.sourceNote: 2026 market = identical landlords deciding competitive pricing meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我問房東為什麼又漲租，
他說：「這是市場行情。」
後來我才發現，所謂市場，
就是一群房東圍在群組裡，決定今年要一起漲多少。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每次被「行情」兩個字打發的朋友轉發，這就是房東界的默契漲價
variations: 「行情」的定義：沒有人說得出來是誰決定的，但大家都默默跟著漲。
房東說是市場決定的，市場說它只是把房東說的話複述一遍。

en.content:
I asked my landlord why the rent went up again.
He said, 'It's just the market rate.'
Later I figured out what 'the market' actually is:
a group of landlords in a chat deciding together how much to raise it this year.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who keeps getting brushed off with 'it's the market' — this is the landlord world's quiet coordinated hike
variations: Definition of 'market rate': nobody can say who decided it, but everyone quietly raised it anyway.
The landlord says the market decides. The market says it's just repeating what the landlord told it.

items.sourceNote: renting = paying impossible money sink still summons a demon meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
租屋就是一個很好玩的遊戲：
你付了一筆付不起的錢，
然後水槽還是會在半夜發出像在召喚惡魔的聲音。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給老屋住戶在深夜被各種怪聲嚇到睡不著的朋友，告訴他這真的不是鬼
variations: 我每月付一萬五，換來的服務是：水管會唱歌、地板會回話、牆壁會記仇。
別人玩遊戲付錢解鎖角色，我付房租解鎖各種我家從沒見過的聲音。

en.content:
Renting is a fun little game:
you pay an amount of money you can't actually afford,
and your sink still makes a noise at midnight like it's summoning a demon.
en.editorNote: Send to an old-building dweller lying awake spooked by mystery noises — reassure them it really isn't a ghost
variations: I pay fifteen hundred a month and the services I get are: singing pipes, a talkative floor, and a wall that holds grudges.
Other people pay to unlock game characters. I pay rent to unlock sounds my apartment has never made before.

items.sourceNote: 為了省錢租雅房 室友超噁3行為 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
為了省三千塊租了雅房，
結果室友洗澡不撿頭髮、上廁所不沖水、廚房永遠有一鍋上週的湯。
我省下的房租，全拿去買漂白水跟心理諮商了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給正在考慮租雅房省錢的朋友，先預警再陪他評估值不值得
variations: 雅房省下的不是錢，是你對人類的信任。
共用衛浴最可怕的不是排隊，是你永遠不知道下一個踩到的是水還是別人的人生。

en.content:
I rented a shared room to save three thousand a month.
Then my roommate never picks the hair out of the drain, never flushes, and there's always a week-old pot of soup in the kitchen.
Everything I saved on rent now goes to bleach and therapy.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend weighing a cheaper shared room — warn them first, then help them decide if it's worth it
variations: A shared room doesn't save you money. It costs you your faith in humanity.
The scariest part of a shared bathroom isn't the wait — it's never knowing whether the next thing you step in is water or someone else's life choices.

items.sourceNote: 房租水電網路拆開算 租屋族算雜支氣炸 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東把租金拆成：房租、水費、電費、網路費、第四台、管理費、清潔費。
我以為我在租房子，
結果我在訂閱一個叫「活著」的方案，而且還是最貴的那一檔。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每月被各種名目分項收費的朋友，提醒他簽約前把全部費用問清楚
variations: 房東的帳單比我手機的吃到飽方案還複雜，差別是手機至少網路是真的快。
我以為月租一萬，加完七種雜支變一萬五——這就是租屋界的「未稅價」。

en.content:
My landlord breaks the bill into: rent, water, electricity, internet, cable, building fee, and cleaning fee.
I thought I was renting an apartment.
Turns out I subscribed to a plan called 'Staying Alive' — and it's the premium tier.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend nickel-and-dimed by itemized monthly charges — remind them to get every fee in writing before signing
variations: My landlord's bill is more complicated than my unlimited phone plan. The difference is my phone's internet is actually fast.
I thought rent was a thousand. Add seven 'extras' and it's fifteen hundred — that's the rental world's version of 'plus tax.'

items.sourceNote: 狗拆20年舊按摩椅索賠12萬 惡房東開價 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我的狗咬壞了房東那張用了二十年的舊沙發，
房東開價十二萬，說那是「古董」。
用二十年叫古董，那我繳二十年房租，是不是也能升值？
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給寵物不小心弄壞房東老舊家具、被獅子大開口的朋友，提醒他折舊本來就要算
variations: 房東的舊家具平常叫「堪用」，賠償的時候立刻變「全新」。
東西在房東手上叫折舊，在我手上叫毀損，這台沙發的身價跟著立場走。

en.content:
My dog chewed up the landlord's twenty-year-old couch.
He demanded twelve thousand, calling it an 'antique.'
If twenty years of use makes it an antique, do my twenty years of rent appreciate too?
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose pet wrecked an ancient piece of landlord furniture and got hit with an outrageous bill — remind them depreciation is a real thing
variations: The landlord's old furniture is 'still usable' day to day, but becomes 'brand new' the moment compensation comes up.
In the landlord's hands it's depreciation. In my hands it's destruction. That couch's value depends entirely on whose side it's on.

items.sourceNote: 學生看房喊租金下月補 苦主搖頭 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
看房的時候他笑著說：「租金我下個月一起補。」
那是我第一次知道，
有些人連還沒住進來，就已經開始欠你錢了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給準備把房間分租出去、卻遇到開口就要賒帳的房客的朋友，提醒他押金一定要先收滿
variations: 「下個月一起補」是租屋界最浪漫的謊言，因為它永遠不會兌現。
他連第一個月都付不出來，卻已經在規劃要怎麼跟我借第二個月。

en.content:
During the viewing he smiled and said, 'I'll just pay this month's rent next month.'
That was the first time I learned
some people start owing you money before they've even moved in.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend about to sublet a room who's meeting tenants angling for credit on day one — remind them to collect the full deposit up front
variations: 'I'll catch up next month' is the most romantic lie in renting, because it never comes true.
He couldn't cover the first month, but he was already planning how to borrow the second from me.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租屋補助突被追回 收公文崩潰 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
領了一年租屋補助，今天收到一張公文，
說我家「登記用途不符」，補助要全數繳回。
原來政府給我的不是補助，是分期借款，到期一次催收。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近收到補助追回公文嚇傻的朋友，提醒他簽約前先確認房屋登記用途
variations: 補助領的時候叫德政，要繳回的時候叫「依法行政」，立場永遠在他們那邊。
我領補助領得很開心，繳回去繳得很心痛，中間只隔一張公文。

en.content:
I collected a year of rent subsidy, then today a letter arrived
saying my place is 'registered for the wrong use' and I have to pay it all back.
Turns out the government didn't give me a subsidy — it gave me an installment loan, collected in full at maturity.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend rattled by a clawback notice — remind them to verify the building's registered use before signing
variations: Collecting the subsidy is called 'good policy.' Paying it back is called 'following the rules.' The deck's always stacked their way.
I was thrilled collecting the subsidy and gutted paying it back, with just one letter in between.

items.sourceNote: 2026 內政部租賃修法限漲幅恐罰30萬 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
新法說房東亂漲租最高可罰三十萬。
房東看完只說了一句：「那我們改簽『包租代管』，這樣漲的不是我。」
原來法律管得住名字，管不住手。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每次租屋修法上新聞時轉發，提醒朋友魔鬼藏在合約的甲乙方稱謂裡
variations: 罰三十萬的是「房東」，所以房東從此都自稱「二房東」。
法律往前走一步，房東就換一個身分往旁邊走兩步。

en.content:
The new law says landlords who jack up rent can be fined up to three hundred thousand.
My landlord read it and said: 'Fine, we'll re-sign through a property management company — then it's not me raising it.'
Turns out the law can pin down a name, but not a hand.
en.editorNote: Good to share whenever rental reform hits the news — remind friends the devil hides in who's named as 'party A' on the lease
variations: The fine targets 'landlords,' so from now on my landlord calls himself a 'subletting agent.'
The law takes one step forward, the landlord swaps identities and takes two steps to the side.

items.sourceNote: 2026 landlord disappears when problem arises meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東有兩種狀態：
收房租那天，他是全聯的會員集點，秒到。
馬桶壞掉那天，他是失蹤人口，連已讀都不給。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給報修三次房東都裝死的朋友，告訴他這不是個案，是業界標準
variations: 房東的回訊速度跟天氣有關：晴天收租秒回，雨天漏水斷訊。
我家漏水那天，房東的手機剛好掉進那灘水裡，從此再也聯絡不上。

en.content:
My landlord has two modes:
on rent day, he's a loyalty-card scanner — instant.
The day the toilet breaks, he's a missing person who won't even leave a read receipt.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose landlord has ghosted three repair requests — reassure them it's not personal, it's industry standard
variations: My landlord's reply speed depends on the weather: sunny on rent day, dead signal the moment it leaks.
The day my ceiling leaked, his phone happened to fall into the puddle — never heard from again.

items.sourceNote: 2026 landlord special gray paint over outlets meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東最愛的顏色是「灰」，
灰到牆壁、插座、門把、連我搬進來的心情都一起灰了。
他不是在粉刷，是在把所有問題刷成同一個色號。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛搬進「房東風裝潢」的朋友，那種一片灰真的不是極簡，是省事
variations: 房東的裝潢哲學是：能用油漆蓋住的，就絕對不修。
插座被漆封住那天，我才懂什麼叫「裝潢一致性」——一致地不能用。

en.content:
My landlord's favorite color is gray —
gray on the walls, the outlets, the door handles, and on my mood the day I moved in.
He's not painting, he's coating every problem in the same shade.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just moved into a 'landlord special' — that wall-to-wall gray isn't minimalism, it's laziness
variations: My landlord's design philosophy: if paint can cover it, he'll never fix it.
The day they painted the outlet shut, I finally understood 'design consistency' — consistently unusable.

items.sourceNote: 押金退還 提前解約 違約金上限 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
法律說押金最多收兩個月、違約金最多賠一個月。
房東說：「法律歸法律，我們這邊是『行情』。」
我這才明白，原來「行情」是房東自己發的另一部憲法。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給準備退租、被房東用「行情」唬住的朋友，附上租賃條例第七條的連結
variations: 押金兩個月是上限，房東當成起跳價；違約金一個月是上限，房東當成折扣價。
我背了一整本租賃條例，房東只背了一句「大家都嘛這樣」。

en.content:
The law says the deposit caps at two months and the penalty caps at one.
My landlord said: 'Law is law, but around here we go by market rate.'
That's when I understood — 'market rate' is just the second constitution landlords write for themselves.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend about to move out who's being bluffed with 'that's just the going rate' — attach a link to the tenancy statute
variations: Two months' deposit is the legal ceiling; my landlord treats it as the floor. One month's penalty is the ceiling; he treats it as a discount.
I memorized the whole tenancy code. My landlord memorized one line: 'everybody does it this way.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 'congrats on a home, now you can afford nothing else' renter meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
恭喜你，現在有一個家了。
壞消息是——你只剩下這個家，
買不起家裡的任何東西。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合剛簽完約、看著空房間發呆的朋友，配一張只有床墊的房間照
variations: 我有了自己的房間，代價是這輩子不能有別的東西。
存款全押在這個家，現在我只能在家，因為出門都要花錢。

en.content:
Congratulations, you have a home now.
The bad news: this home is all you have left,
because you can't afford anything to put inside it.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just signed a lease and is staring at an empty room — pair it with a photo of a room that's just a mattress
variations: I finally got my own room. The price was never owning anything else for the rest of my life.
My whole savings went into this place, so now I just stay in — going outside costs money too.

items.sourceNote: 2026 'studio price sounds like a joke but it's real' rock-crevice studio meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房仲報價的時候我笑了，
以為他在講笑話。
後來才發現他是認真的，
而我才是那個笑話。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合剛看完一間貴到離譜的套房的朋友抒發，這年頭房價本身就是脫口秀
variations: 現在的套房租金聽起來像段子，問題是房東沒在開玩笑。
我以為「這個價錢」後面會接「我跟你開玩笑的」，結果他直接遞合約。

en.content:
When the agent quoted the price, I laughed.
I thought it was a joke.
Then I realized he was dead serious —
and the joke was me.
en.editorNote: Perfect for a friend who just toured a wildly overpriced studio — these days the rent itself is stand-up comedy
variations: Studio rents sound like punchlines now. The problem is the landlord isn't joking.
I waited for him to say 'just kidding' after the number. Instead he handed me the contract.

items.sourceNote: 2026 landlord screening tenant profession discrimination register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東問我做什麼工作、有沒有男朋友、養不養寵物、會不會在家煮飯。
我以為我在看房，
結果我在相親，對象是一間套房。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給看房被房東當履歷面試的朋友，互相吐槽這比找工作還難
variations: 找工作要面試，找房子也要面試，差別是房子還會漲薪——漲它自己的。
房東篩房客比公司篩員工還嚴，難怪我同時被工作跟套房拒絕。

en.content:
The landlord asked what I do for work, whether I have a boyfriend, if I keep pets, and whether I cook at home.
I thought I was viewing an apartment.
Turns out I was on a blind date — with a studio.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who got grilled like a job applicant during a viewing — commiserate that this is harder than job hunting
variations: Job hunting has interviews. Apartment hunting has interviews too. The difference is the apartment gets a raise — its own.
Landlords screen tenants harder than companies screen employees. No wonder I got rejected by a job and a studio in the same week.

items.sourceNote: 2026 rent-day dread / payday-to-rent-day countdown meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
別人的月初是新的開始，
我的月初是房租提醒，
薪水進帳的通知跟扣款的通知，
中間只隔了一口呼吸。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每月一號薪水秒變房租的上班族發限動，配兩張只差三秒的銀行通知截圖
variations: 薪水入帳的喜悅，撐不到我打開房租轉帳頁面。
我的薪水只是路過我的戶頭，跟房東打個招呼就走了。

en.content:
For other people, the first of the month is a fresh start.
For me it's a rent reminder —
the 'salary deposited' alert and the 'payment withdrawn' alert
are separated by a single breath.
en.editorNote: Perfect for office workers whose paycheck instantly becomes rent — pair with two bank alerts timestamped three seconds apart
variations: The joy of getting paid doesn't survive long enough for me to open the rent transfer page.
My salary just passes through my account, waves at the landlord, and leaves.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租屋不能開伙 PTT/Dcard register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東說：「我們這邊不能開伙。」
我笑了，
反正以現在的房租，我也買不起菜。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛被房東規定不能煮飯的朋友，互相苦笑——反正外送也吃不起
variations: 不能開伙、不能養寵物、不能晚歸——我租的不是房子，是宿舍兼監獄。
房東怕油煙，我怕帳單，我們其實是同一種人。

en.content:
Landlord: 'No cooking allowed here.'
I laughed —
with rent this high, I can't afford groceries anyway.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose landlord just banned cooking — laugh it off, delivery's out of budget too
variations: No cooking, no pets, no late nights — I didn't rent an apartment, I rented a dorm slash prison.
The landlord fears grease, I fear the bill. We're actually the same kind of person.

items.sourceNote: 2026 標註可租補後租金漲超過補助 viral discussion; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
以前萬元的小套房，現在標著「可租補」，
租金一萬五。
政府補我四千，房東漲我五千。
我終於懂了——補助不是補我，是補房東。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合研究完租補卻發現物件全部漲價的朋友轉發，附上那則 udn 新聞苦笑
variations: 標「可租補」三個字，房東就敢加五千，這三個字比黃金還值錢。
補助上線那天，套房漲價，房東升級，只有我原地踏步。

en.content:
The studio that used to be a thousand now says 'subsidy-eligible'
and rents for fifteen hundred.
The government gives me four hundred, the landlord adds five.
I finally get it — the subsidy isn't for me, it's for him.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who researched the rent subsidy only to find every listing jacked up the price — attach the news story for a bitter laugh
variations: Just the words 'subsidy-eligible' let the landlord tack on five hundred. Those three words are worth more than gold.
The day subsidies launched, studios went up, landlords leveled up, and I stayed exactly where I was.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租賃修法 租霸下車條款 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
新法限制房東漲租，房東很緊張，
同時增訂「租霸下車條款」，房東又很開心。
一條法律讓房東先哭再笑，
而我從頭到尾只是站在路邊看戲的乘客。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每次租屋修法上新聞時轉發，提醒朋友法律保護的從來不只一邊
variations: 限漲幅、罰三十萬，房東怕；給下車條款，房東笑。法律很公平，公平到我沒份。
新聞說修法保障租客，我看完只想問：那保障我的那條在第幾頁？

en.content:
The new law caps rent hikes, so the landlord gets nervous.
It also adds a 'evict-the-deadbeat' clause, so the landlord gets happy.
One law makes him cry, then smile —
and I'm just the passenger on the curb watching the show.
en.editorNote: Good to share whenever rental-law reform hits the news — a reminder that the law never protects just one side
variations: Cap the hikes, fine up to thirty thousand: landlord scared. Add the eviction clause: landlord grins. The law's fair — so fair I'm not in it.
News says the reform protects tenants. I just want to know: what page is the clause that protects me?
