items.sourceNote: 2026 'landlord special' repair excuse loop meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我報修的訊息有三個階段：
第一週「已讀」，
第二週「明天去看」，
第三週「你怎麼把它弄壞的」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給報修石沉大海、最後還被房東倒打一耙的朋友，截圖對話一起貼
variations: 房東修東西的速度，慢到我都自己學會了。
報修第一天他關心，第三十天他懷疑，第六十天他漲租。

en.content:
My repair request goes through three stages:
Week one: 'seen.'
Week two: 'I'll come by tomorrow.'
Week three: 'How did you break it?'
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose repair request vanished into the void and then got blamed on them — screenshot the thread together
variations: My landlord fixes things so slowly I just learned to do it myself.
Day one of the repair request he cares, day thirty he doubts me, day sixty he raises rent.

items.sourceNote: 2026 buying furniture for a place you don't own meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我猶豫了三個月才買下那張喜歡的沙發，
買回來才想到——
下次搬家，它不是跟我走，就是被我丟。
原來租屋的人連喜歡一樣東西都要算成本。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合剛布置完租屋處、又開始煩惱下次搬家的朋友，那種捨不得很真實
variations: 我買的每一件家具，都附贈一個問題：搬家那天你要怎麼辦？
租屋族的浪漫是布置一個不屬於自己、隨時要還的家。

en.content:
I spent three months deciding to buy the couch I loved.
The moment it arrived I realized —
next time I move, it either comes with me or goes in the trash.
Renters have to do a cost-benefit analysis just to like something.
en.editorNote: Perfect for a friend who just decorated their rental and is already dreading the next move — that reluctance is painfully real
variations: Every piece of furniture I buy comes with a free question: what'll you do with it on moving day?
A renter's idea of romance is decorating a home that isn't theirs and could be reclaimed any day.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租屋抵稅18萬 房東不肯給收據改匯款; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
抵稅額調高到十八萬，聽起來很爽。
問房東要付款證明，他說：「妳改匯款嘛，順便房租加兩千。」
原來政府給我的十八萬，是讓房東先預支的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合五月報稅季前轉發給準備跟房東喬收據的朋友，提醒他匯款留紀錄就是最好的證明
variations: 扣除額升到十八萬，我能省的稅大概剛好夠付房東漲的那一筆。
房東說：「報稅可以，但別讓我被國稅局找上。」我說那您是要我報稅還是報恩？

en.content:
The deduction cap jumped to a hundred eighty thousand — sounds amazing.
I asked my landlord for proof of payment. He said: 'Just wire it instead, and rent goes up two thousand.'
Turns out the deduction the government gave me, my landlord drew first.
en.editorNote: Send before May tax season to a friend negotiating receipts with their landlord — remind them a bank transfer record is the cleanest proof
variations: The cap rose to a hundred eighty thousand. The tax I'd save just about covers the hike my landlord added.
Landlord said: 'Report it if you must, just don't get me audited.' So do you want me to file taxes or pay tribute?

items.sourceNote: 2026 Dcard 看房該問什麼問題討論; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
第一次看房，我什麼都不敢問。
第十次看房，我會問：訊號、漏水、水壓、鄰居、房東脾氣、退租押金怎麼算。
看房看到後來，我不是在找房子，我是在做盡職調查。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給第一次自己找房、緊張到不敢開口問問題的朋友，告訴他敢問才不會踩雷
variations: 看房前我列了二十個問題，房仲回答完十九個，剩下那個叫「真的有這麼便宜嗎」。
新手看房看裝潢，老手看房看天花板的水漬。

en.content:
First apartment viewing, I was too shy to ask anything.
Tenth viewing, I ask about signal, leaks, water pressure, neighbors, the landlord's temper, and exactly how the deposit gets calculated at move-out.
By now I'm not viewing apartments — I'm running due diligence.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend touring their first place who's too nervous to ask questions — tell them the questions are what keep you out of trouble
variations: I had twenty questions ready before the viewing. The agent answered nineteen. The last one was 'is it really this cheap?'
Beginners inspect the decor. Veterans inspect the ceiling for water stains.

items.sourceNote: 2026 'competitive pricing' identical landlords meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東說漲租是因為「市場行情」。
我後來才知道，所謂市場行情，
就是一群房東圍成一圈，互相說「你漲我也漲」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每次被房東用「行情」兩個字搪塞的朋友轉發，戳破這個沒有人能說清楚的詞
variations: 「行情」是房東們最團結的時候，比工會還準時。
房東漲租從來不用理由，因為「行情」就是他們發明的理由。

en.content:
My landlord said the rent hike was just 'market rate.'
Later I figured out what market rate means:
a circle of landlords telling each other, 'you raise yours, I'll raise mine.'
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who keeps getting brushed off with the word 'market' — it pops the one term nobody can actually explain
variations: 'Market rate' is the most united landlords ever get — more reliable than any union.
Landlords never need a reason to raise rent, because 'the market' is the reason they invented.

items.sourceNote: 2026 'congratulations on having a home, now you can afford nothing else' meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
繳完房租那一刻，恭喜你，你有家了。
壞消息是——
你現在除了這個家，什麼都買不起。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每月一號繳完房租、看著空空的帳戶苦笑的朋友轉發，配一張泡麵照最對味
variations: 我有一個屋簷，沒有一頓好飯；有一張床，沒有一場旅行。
房租繳完那天，我的人生只剩下兩個選擇：吃飯，或者繼續活著。

en.content:
The moment you pay rent — congratulations, you have a home.
The bad news is
you can now afford nothing except that home.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend staring at an empty balance on the first of the month — pair it with a photo of instant noodles
variations: I've got a roof but not a decent meal, a bed but not a single trip.
The day rent clears, life narrows to two options: eat, or keep existing.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租補不承認頂加 5加6房屋雙重崩潰 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我住的是五加六——
五樓加蓋的第六層。
租補說我不算，房東說屋況就這樣，
只有夏天的太陽最公平：它從來沒漏掉我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給住頂樓加蓋、夏天熱到融化又領不到補助的朋友，苦笑之餘記得多喝水
variations: 頂加的浪漫是離天空最近，離補助最遠。
房東說頂樓視野好，沒說的是夏天四十度、冬天漏風、補助永遠輪不到我。

en.content:
I live in a 'five-plus-six' —
the sixth floor stacked illegally on top of a five-story building.
The subsidy says I don't count, the landlord says the place is what it is,
and only the summer sun is fair: it never once skips me.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend baking in an illegal rooftop add-on who can't claim the subsidy — laugh, then remind them to hydrate
variations: The romance of a rooftop add-on: closest to the sky, furthest from any subsidy.
Landlord said the rooftop has a great view. What he left out: 104°F summers, drafty winters, and a subsidy I'll never qualify for.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租補變相助長漲租 房東加價比補助還多 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
政府發我八千租補，
房東漲我一萬房租。
我終於懂了——
所謂補助，是政府請房東吃飯，帳單寄給我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每次看到「租補害漲租」新聞時轉發，苦笑之餘記得截圖存證
variations: 前幾年月租九千的套房，現在標「可租補」就要一萬五，補助補的是房東的勇氣。
租補上路那天，房東的漲價通知比補助核定還早到。

en.content:
The government gives me eight thousand in rent aid.
My landlord raises rent by ten.
Now I finally get it —
the subsidy is the government treating my landlord to dinner, and mailing me the bill.
en.editorNote: Good to share whenever 'subsidies are fueling rent hikes' headlines drop — laugh, then screenshot the notice as evidence
variations: A studio that was nine hundred a few years ago now lists at fifteen hundred the moment it says 'subsidy eligible.' The aid is funding the landlord's nerve.
The day rent aid launched, my landlord's hike notice arrived before my approval letter did.

items.sourceNote: Dcard 押金 退租刁難 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
押金的全名應該叫「房東的情緒費」。
他心情好，退你九成；
心情不好，牆上一個指紋都能扣你三千。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給正在準備退租、怕押金被刁難的朋友，提醒他退租前先拍照存證
variations: 押金兩個月，退我半個月，剩下的房東說是「青春損耗費」。
我退租前把房子打掃得比入住還乾淨，房東還是找到了一條我看不見的刮痕。

en.content:
'Security deposit' should really be called 'the landlord's mood fee.'
Good mood, you get ninety percent back.
Bad mood, one fingerprint on the wall costs you three thousand.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend prepping to move out and dreading a deposit dispute — remind them to photograph everything first
variations: Two months' deposit, half a month refunded. The rest, my landlord called a 'wear-and-tear-of-youth fee.'
I left the place cleaner than the day I moved in. My landlord still found a scratch only he could see.

items.sourceNote: 2026 rent goes up and up lease loop meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房租只會往上，不會往下，
就像我的年紀，
不像我的存款。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合生日當天又收到漲租通知的朋友轉發，雙重打擊配一個蛋糕表情
variations: 房租一年漲一次，薪水三年調一次，這場比賽我從一開始就輸了。
唯一陪我一起變老的，是每年都更貴的房租。

en.content:
Rent only goes up, never down,
just like my age,
unlike my savings.
en.editorNote: Perfect for a friend who got a rent hike on their birthday — double blow, pair it with a cake emoji
variations: Rent goes up once a year, my salary every three. I lost this race before it started.
The only thing aging right alongside me is the rent that climbs every single year.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租補嚴審 頂加無建物登記不發補助 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
政府說沒有建物登記的房子不能領補助。
我住的地方在地圖上有、在門牌上有、在我帳單上更有，
就是在政府眼裡沒有。
原來我繳的房租，繳給一棟「不存在」的房子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給住頂加、夾層、無登記套房的朋友，補助領不到時互相打氣
variations: 我家有水有電有Wi-Fi，唯獨沒有「合法存在」這一項配備。
房東收租時我家很真實，補助審查時我家就消失了。

en.content:
The government says a place with no building registration can't claim the subsidy.
Where I live shows up on the map, on the mailbox, and very much on my bill —
it just doesn't exist in the government's eyes.
Turns out my rent goes to a home that officially isn't there.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend in a rooftop add-on, loft, or unregistered studio who can't claim the subsidy — mutual encouragement
variations: My place has water, power, and Wi-Fi. The one feature it's missing is 'legally existing.'
My home is very real when the landlord collects rent, and vanishes the moment the subsidy gets reviewed.

items.sourceNote: 2026 landlord raises rent after basic maintenance meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我報修了三個月，房東終於來修水龍頭。
修好的隔天，他傳訊息說：
「房子有維護，下個月房租加八百。」
原來修好我家的水龍頭，是要我自費的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給報修很久終於修好、卻被當成漲租理由的朋友，氣到笑出來那種
variations: 房東把該修的修一修，叫做「升級」，把不該漲的漲一漲，叫做「合理」。
我要的是不漏水的水龍頭，房東給的是會漲價的房租。

en.content:
I filed a repair request for three months. My landlord finally fixed the faucet.
The next day he texted:
'The unit's been maintained — rent goes up eight hundred next month.'
Turns out fixing my own faucet was something I had to pay extra for.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose long-awaited repair became the excuse for a rent hike — the laugh-because-you're-furious kind
variations: Landlord fixes what he was supposed to fix and calls it an 'upgrade,' raises what he shouldn't raise and calls it 'fair.'
I asked for a faucet that doesn't leak. What I got was rent that doesn't stop climbing.

items.sourceNote: 2026 房東大讚租客準時繳租仍想漲租 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東在群組裡公開稱讚我：「這個房客最棒，從來不遲繳。」
下一句就是：「所以明年想跟你討論一下房租。」
原來我越乖，他越敢漲。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種準時繳租、從不囉嗦結果反而被盯上漲租的朋友，安慰他乖不一定有好報
variations: 房東說我是模範房客，模範房客的獎勵就是模範漲幅。
我準時繳租兩年，換來的是一句「你這麼配合，應該不介意加一點吧」。

en.content:
My landlord praised me publicly: 'Best tenant ever, never pays late.'
Then, in the same breath: 'So I'd like to talk about next year's rent.'
Turns out the better behaved I am, the bolder he gets.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who pays on time and never complains but somehow became the rent-hike target — being good doesn't always pay off
variations: Landlord called me a model tenant. The reward for being a model tenant is a model rent increase.
Two years of paying on time, and what I got was 'you've been so cooperative, you won't mind a little bump, right?'

items.sourceNote: 2026 綁約3年限漲租 好房東先退場 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
新法說要綁約三年、限制漲幅，保護房客。
結果第一個受不了的是我那個從不漲租的好房東——
他直接把房子賣了。
原來保護房客的方式，是先讓好房東消失。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在每次居住正義新法上路時轉發，提醒大家好政策有時會嚇跑好房東
variations: 我等了五年才遇到一個不漲租的房東，新法上路後他第一個跑。
法律保護房客，房客卻先失去了最好的那個房東。

en.content:
The new law locks in three-year leases and caps rent hikes to protect tenants.
The first one to bail was my good landlord who never raised the rent —
he just sold the place.
Turns out the way to protect tenants is to make the good landlords disappear first.
en.editorNote: Good to share whenever new tenant-protection laws take effect — a reminder that good policy can scare off the good landlords too
variations: Took me five years to find a landlord who never raised rent. The new law went live and he was the first to run.
The law protects tenants, and the tenant lost the best landlord first.

items.sourceNote: 2026 Dcard 租屋換約 條款偷改 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東說：「換約只是走個流程，內容都一樣啦。」
我認真比對了新舊合約，
發現「都一樣」的部分只有我的名字，
其他全部偷偷升級了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給準備換約續租的朋友，提醒他一定要逐字比對新舊版本，別信「都一樣」
variations: 換約那天房東遞給我一份「跟去年一樣」的合約，差別是房租、押金、跟我的耐心都被調漲了。
我以為換約是續緣，房東以為換約是調價。

en.content:
My landlord said: 'Renewing the lease is just a formality, it's all the same.'
I compared the old contract to the new one line by line,
and the only part that stayed 'the same' was my name —
everything else had been quietly upgraded.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend about to renew their lease — tell them to compare old and new word for word, never trust 'it's all the same'
variations: On renewal day my landlord handed me a contract 'just like last year's.' The difference: rent, deposit, and my patience all got bumped up.
I thought renewing was about continuing a relationship. My landlord thought it was about adjusting the price.

items.sourceNote: 2026 學生看房喊租金下月補 苦主搖頭 viral case; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
看房的學生對我說：「這個月先住，租金下個月補。」
我說好。
下個月他補了——補了一句「不好意思我已經搬走了」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給當二房東或轉租遇到雷房客的朋友，提醒先收租再給鑰匙
variations: 他說「我很有誠意」，誠意的單位顯然不是新台幣。
房客欠租跑路那天，我才終於懂了房東為什麼總是那麼防備。

en.content:
The student viewing the room told me: 'I'll move in this month and pay the rent next month.'
I said okay.
Next month he did pay up — paid me a 'sorry, I already moved out.'
en.editorNote: Send to a friend subletting or acting as a middle-landlord who got burned by a flaky tenant — collect rent before handing over the keys
variations: He said 'I'm completely sincere.' Sincerity, apparently, isn't measured in dollars.
The day my tenant skipped out on rent, I finally understood why landlords are always so guarded.

items.sourceNote: 2026 房東漲租英文怎麼談 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東說要漲租的時候，
我在心裡準備了一整篇有理有據的反駁，
結果開口只說出：「喔……好喔。」
原來我練了三天的台詞，敵不過他三秒的氣勢。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次想跟房東談判卻當場慫掉的朋友，安慰他嘴笨不是他的錯
variations: 我在浴室對著鏡子排練怎麼拒絕漲租，真的見到房東只擠得出一個微笑。
我的內心戲是律師等級，我的嘴巴是幼稚園等級。

en.content:
When my landlord announced the rent hike,
I had a whole well-reasoned rebuttal prepared in my head,
and all that came out was: 'Oh… okay, sure.'
Turns out three days of rehearsed lines are no match for three seconds of his nerve.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who always means to push back on the landlord but folds on the spot — being bad at confrontation isn't your fault
variations: I rehearsed refusing the rent hike in front of the bathroom mirror. Face to face with the landlord, all I managed was a smile.
My inner monologue is lawyer-level. My actual mouth is kindergarten-level.

items.sourceNote: 2026 退押金45工作天 vs 一般7天 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東收房租：當天到帳。
房東退押金：請等四十五個工作天。
原來錢進他口袋是高鐵，回我口袋是走路。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛退租、押金被房東拖了一個多月還沒退的朋友，順便提醒他白紙黑字寫退款期限
variations: 我押金被押到下一份租約都簽好了，房東說「快了快了」，這句話他說了第七週。
繳租秒到帳，退押三個月，這條河叫做「房東的良心」。

en.content:
Landlord collecting rent: instant transfer.
Landlord returning the deposit: please allow forty-five business days.
Apparently money flies to his pocket by bullet train and walks back to mine on foot.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who moved out over a month ago and still hasn't seen their deposit — remind them to get the refund deadline in writing
variations: My deposit was held hostage long enough for me to sign my next lease. Landlord keeps saying 'soon' — it's been seven weeks.
Rent clears in a second, the deposit takes three months. That river is called 'the landlord's conscience.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 communal fridge passive-aggressive note meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
共用冰箱上貼的便利貼，
從「請勿動我的優格」進化成「我知道是誰，我有裝攝影機」。
這不是合租，是諜對諜。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在合租公寓被偷吃東西、開始用便利貼宣戰的朋友互傳，苦笑一下再深呼吸
variations: 我們家最有溫度的對話，全部發生在冰箱門上的便利貼。
室友之間不講話，但冰箱上的便利貼已經吵到第三回合。

en.content:
The sticky notes on the shared fridge
evolved from 'please don't touch my yogurt' to 'I know who it was, I installed a camera.'
This isn't co-living, it's a spy thriller.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose roommates have started waging sticky-note warfare over stolen food — laugh, then take a deep breath
variations: The warmest conversations in our apartment all happen on sticky notes stuck to the fridge door.
My roommates and I don't talk, but the notes on the fridge are already in round three of an argument.

items.sourceNote: 2026 'it's fine' while Googling tenant rights meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東每次有理講不通的時候，
我嘴巴說「沒關係啦」，
手指在桌子底下默默搜尋「房客可以怎麼自救」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次面對房東都假裝沒事、私下偷查法條的朋友，告訴他偷查不丟臉
variations: 我對房東的標準回應是「好喔」，對 Google 的標準提問是「這樣他犯法嗎」。
表面上我是個好說話的房客，瀏覽紀錄裡我是個準備提告的人。

en.content:
Every time my landlord is being unreasonable,
my mouth says 'it's totally fine,'
while my fingers quietly Google 'what can a tenant do' under the table.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who always plays it cool with the landlord but secretly looks up the law — tell them there's no shame in it
variations: My standard reply to the landlord is 'sure, okay.' My standard query to Google is 'is this actually illegal.'
On the surface I'm an easygoing tenant. In my search history I'm filing a lawsuit.

items.sourceNote: 2026 簽約前拍照存證避糾紛 tip; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
搬進去那天我拍了八十七張照片，
不是因為這裡漂亮，
是為了退租那天證明這些裂痕、霉斑、抓痕，
在我來之前就已經住在這裡了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛要簽約、第一次自己租屋的朋友，提醒他簽約前一定要把每個角落拍清楚
variations: 別人搬新家拍美照，我搬新家拍證據。
我相簿裡最珍貴的不是旅行照，是租屋處每一道牆角的犯罪現場存證。

en.content:
On move-in day I took eighty-seven photos —
not because the place was pretty,
but so that on move-out day I could prove these cracks, mold, and scratches
were already living here before I was.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend signing their first lease — remind them to photograph every corner before they sign anything
variations: Other people take pretty photos of their new home. I take evidence.
The most precious shots in my camera roll aren't vacation pics — they're crime-scene documentation of every corner of my rental.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租屋補助申請流程繁複 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
申請租屋補助要附：合約、租金證明、戶籍、財產清單、銀行帳號、還有一顆不會在中途放棄的心。
最後那項我繳不出來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給卡在租屋補助申請表單填到一半就想放棄的朋友，互相加油填完它
variations: 補助一個月最多省幾千元，申請流程花掉我一整個週末的快樂。
政府說補助很簡單，那個「簡單」跟房東說的「只漲一點點」是同一種語言。

en.content:
Applying for the rent subsidy requires: the lease, proof of rent, household registration, an asset list, your bank account, and a heart that won't give up halfway.
That last one I couldn't produce.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend stuck halfway through the subsidy application form and ready to quit — cheer each other on to the finish
variations: The subsidy saves a few thousand a month at most. The application cost me a whole weekend of happiness.
The government says applying is simple. That 'simple' speaks the same language as the landlord's 'just a tiny increase.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 租補變相助長漲租 房東加價比補助多 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我看上一間標「可租補」的房子，
看到租金才發現——
它漲的比補助還多。
所謂可租補，是房東先幫你領，再幫你還。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給正在找標榜可申請補助、結果租金被先墊高的朋友，提醒他自己算一下淨值
variations: 「可租補」三個字是房東的漲價許可證，補助到我手上之前先繞房東一圈。
我以為可租補是優惠，後來發現是房東提前把補助算進房租裡的暗號。

en.content:
I found a place advertised as 'subsidy-eligible.'
Then I saw the rent —
it was raised by more than the subsidy itself.
'Subsidy-eligible' means the landlord collects it for you, then makes you give it back.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend hunting for a 'subsidy-eligible' rental only to find the rent pre-inflated — remind them to run the net math themselves
variations: The phrase 'subsidy-eligible' is the landlord's permission slip to raise the price. The subsidy detours through him before it reaches me.
I thought 'subsidy-eligible' was a perk. Turns out it's code for the landlord pricing the subsidy in before you even apply.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租補不承認頂加 5+6 榮景不再 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
新制說頂加不算合法住宅，不能領補助。
所以我繳的不是房租，是「在屋頂上存在」的服務費，
而且這項服務政府不承認、房東不負責、補助不適用。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給住頂加、夾層、鐵皮屋被新制排除在補助外的朋友，互相苦笑這個身分
variations: 我住的地方，政府說不算房子，房東說算他的，補助說不算我的。
頂加的房客最懂什麼叫三不管地帶——三方都管不到，只有房租管得到我。

en.content:
The new rule says rooftop add-ons aren't legal housing, so no subsidy for me.
So what I pay isn't rent — it's a service fee for 'existing on a roof,'
a service the government won't recognize, the landlord won't cover, and the subsidy won't touch.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend in a rooftop shack or loft cut out of the new subsidy rules — a bitter laugh at the limbo status
variations: The place I live: the government says it's not a house, the landlord says it's his, the subsidy says it's not mine.
Rooftop tenants know 'no man's land' best — nobody's jurisdiction reaches me, but the rent always does.

items.sourceNote: 2026 'congrats on a home, can afford nothing else' meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
恭喜你，有一個自己的家。
壞消息是，繳完房租之後，
你能負擔的就只剩下那個家而已。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每月一號繳完房租、看著存款歸零的朋友轉發，配一張只剩泡麵的廚房照
variations: 我有一個遮風避雨的家，代價是這輩子都不能有別的東西。
房租繳完，我的人生選項從「想吃什麼」變成「還剩什麼」。

en.content:
Congratulations, you have a home of your own.
The bad news is, after rent,
the only thing you can afford is that home.
en.editorNote: Perfect for the first of the month, watching your balance hit zero — pair it with a photo of a kitchen down to instant noodles
variations: I have a roof over my head. The price is never being able to have anything else.
After rent clears, my life's menu changes from 'what do I want' to 'what's left.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 看房該問什麼問題 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
看房的時候我學會問三個問題：
「冬天會不會反潮？」「隔壁吵不吵？」「漏水你修不修？」
房東三題都答「不會」，
我才知道最會漏的，是他的良心。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給第一次自己看房、不知道該問什麼的朋友，提醒他房東說不會的，通常都會
variations: 看房必問題庫：會不會潮、會不會吵、會不會漏；房東必答模板：不會、不會、不會。
房東說「這房子沒什麼問題」，翻譯成中文是「問題等你住進來才會出現」。

en.content:
Touring a place, I learned to ask three questions:
'Does it get damp in winter?' 'Are the neighbors loud?' 'Will you fix leaks?'
The landlord answered 'no' to all three —
and that's how I learned the biggest leak was his conscience.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend touring their first apartment and unsure what to ask — whatever the landlord swears won't happen usually does
variations: Apartment-tour question bank: damp, loud, leaks? Landlord answer template: no, no, no.
Landlord said 'this place has no problems.' Translation: 'the problems wait until you move in.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 tired of renting ready to own meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我每個月都告訴自己：
再撐一年就存夠頭期款。
這句話我跟房東續約了五次，
房東的房貸都快繳完了，我的頭期款還在原地。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每年都說要存錢買房、卻一直在幫房東繳房貸的朋友，溫柔地拍拍他
variations: 我繳的房租加起來，足夠買下房東當初買這間房的價格。
存頭期款像減肥，我每年都說要開始，每年都繼續繳房租。

en.content:
Every month I tell myself:
one more year and I'll have the down payment saved.
I've said that through five lease renewals.
The landlord's almost paid off his mortgage, and my down payment hasn't moved an inch.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who vows to save for a house every year but keeps paying down the landlord's mortgage instead — a gentle pat on the back
variations: Add up all the rent I've paid, and it covers what the landlord originally paid for this place.
Saving a down payment is like dieting: I swear I'll start every year, and every year I just keep paying rent.

items.sourceNote: 2026 'describing renting as challenging is like calling a fire a warmth situation' meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
有人問我現在租屋「會不會有點辛苦」。
這就像問住在火災現場的人「會不會有點溫暖」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合被長輩問「現在租屋還好吧」時拿來回，幽默又不失禮地表達現實
variations: 說租屋「有點吃力」，就像說鐵達尼號「有點潮濕」。
他們說年輕人吃苦耐勞，我每個月繳房租的時候，苦跟勞都齊全了。

en.content:
Someone asked if renting these days is 'a little tough.'
That's like asking someone standing in a house fire if they're 'feeling a bit warm.'
en.editorNote: Perfect comeback when a relative asks 'so renting's going okay, right?' — funny without being rude about the reality
variations: Calling renting 'a bit of a strain' is like calling the Titanic 'a little damp.'
They say young people are tough and hardworking. Every time rent is due, I've got the tough and the working covered.

items.sourceNote: 2026 打開租屋網嚇壞 反被租補害了 房東1招反制 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我打開租屋網想找便宜一點的，
結果整頁都標「可申請補助」，
租金一個比一個高。
原來補助不是給房客的優惠，是給房東的漲價靈感。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給正在租屋網滑到懷疑人生的朋友，提醒他看到「可租補」先把租金跟去年比一比
variations: 租屋網的「可租補」三個字，等於商品上的「原價」——存在的意義就是讓你以為你賺到。
我想靠補助省錢，房東想靠補助賺錢，最後省到的是我的睡眠，賺到的是他的房貸。

en.content:
I opened the rental site hoping to find something cheaper.
Every listing was tagged 'subsidy-eligible,'
and each rent was higher than the last.
Turns out the subsidy isn't a perk for tenants — it's pricing inspiration for landlords.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend doomscrolling rental sites — remind them that whenever they see 'subsidy-eligible,' compare the rent to last year first
variations: 'Subsidy-eligible' on a listing is like the 'original price' tag on a sale item — it exists only to make you think you're winning.
I tried to save money with the subsidy, the landlord tried to make money with it. In the end I saved my sleep and he made his mortgage payment.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租賃條例修法 漲幅須對照主計總處房租指數 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
新法說房東漲租要對照主計總處的房租指數。
房東看完點點頭，
然後把「電費」「網路」「管理費」全部各加五百。
他沒漲房租，他只是讓房子周邊的一切都通膨。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給以為新法能擋漲租、結果被各種名目分屍的朋友，提醒他逐項問清楚
variations: 房東說「房租我一毛沒漲」，這句話的標點符號藏在電費、水費跟那個莫名其妙的「設備使用費」裡。
法律管得到房租，管不到房東的創意，他總有一百種讓你多付錢的方式。

en.content:
The new law says landlords can only raise rent in line with the official housing price index.
My landlord nodded along,
then added five hundred each to 'electricity,' 'internet,' and 'management fees.'
He didn't raise the rent — he just inflated everything orbiting the apartment.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who thought the new law would stop hikes but got dismembered by add-on fees instead — remind them to itemize everything
variations: Landlord says 'I haven't raised the rent a cent.' That sentence's punctuation is hidden in the electricity, water, and a mysterious 'equipment usage fee.'
The law can govern the rent, but not the landlord's creativity. He's always got a hundred ways to make you pay more.

items.sourceNote: 2026 'landlord special' shoddy DIY repair meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我報修漏水，房東來「修」了。
他的方法是：在漏水處貼一張防水膠帶，
再在膠帶上補一張，最後拿油漆把整片刷白。
房東的維修哲學是：看不到，就等於修好了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛被房東「土法煉鋼」修過家裡的朋友，配一張那條膠帶的照片更有戲
variations: 房東的工具箱只有三樣東西：膠帶、白漆、跟一句「應該沒問題了吧」。
房東修東西的標準不是「會不會再壞」，是「我搬走之前會不會再壞」。

en.content:
I reported a leak, and the landlord came to 'fix' it.
His method: slap waterproof tape over the spot,
add another strip on top, then paint the whole patch white.
The landlord's repair philosophy: if you can't see it, it's fixed.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose landlord just gave the place the 'landlord special' — bonus drama if you attach a photo of that tape
variations: My landlord's toolbox holds exactly three things: tape, white paint, and the phrase 'that should do it.'
My landlord's repair standard isn't 'will it break again,' it's 'will it break again before I move out.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 看房後要同批租客都匯款 詐騙 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
看房看到一間又便宜又漂亮的，
「房東」說很搶手，叫我先匯訂金卡位。
我匯之前問了一句：「可以先看身分證跟權狀嗎？」
他已讀我，然後消失。
在租屋市場，太美好的，通常是詐騙。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給第一次自己找房、看到超低價房源心動的朋友，提醒他匯款前一定要驗房東身分
variations: 租屋鐵律：對方越急著要你匯款，那間房就越不存在。
我差點被一間「便宜到不可思議」的房子騙走訂金，後來才懂，不可思議的從來不是房子，是我的天真。

en.content:
I toured a place that was cheap and gorgeous.
The 'landlord' said it was in high demand and told me to wire a deposit to hold it.
Before sending, I asked one thing: 'Can I see your ID and the property deed first?'
He read the message, then vanished.
In the rental market, anything too good is usually a scam.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend hunting their first place and tempted by a suspiciously cheap listing — remind them to verify the landlord's identity before wiring a cent
variations: Rental rule of iron: the more urgently they want you to wire money, the less that apartment exists.
I almost got scammed out of a deposit by an 'unbelievably cheap' place. Later I realized the unbelievable part was never the apartment — it was my naivety.

items.sourceNote: Lois Griffin 'congrats on a home, now afford nothing' meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
恭喜你，有一個家了。
壞消息是，你現在什麼都買不起。
冰箱會以這份成就為榮，所以它選擇保持空的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每月繳完房租後對著空冰箱發限動，配一張只有調味料的冰箱照片
variations: 我有屋簷可以遮風避雨，但沒有預算可以吃飯，人生真的很平衡。
繳完房租那一刻我終於擁有了家，也終於失去了買菜的自由。

en.content:
Congratulations, you have a home.
The bad news is you can now afford nothing else.
The fridge honors this achievement by staying empty.
en.editorNote: Perfect to post after paying rent each month, paired with a photo of a fridge containing only condiments
variations: I have a roof over my head and no budget for food. Truly a balanced life.
The moment I paid rent, I finally had a home — and finally lost the freedom to buy groceries.

items.sourceNote: PTT 房版百年難解問題 租房好還是買房好 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
「租房好還是買房好」這個問題，
買得起的人才有資格煩惱。
我這種，問題只有一個：
下個月的房租要從哪裡生出來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合看到「該租還該買」理財文時苦笑轉發，提醒大家有些人連選擇權都沒有
variations: 別人在算房貸划不划算，我在算這個月能不能不要吃土。
租房派跟買房派吵了一百年，唯一的共識是：我們都付不起。

en.content:
'Is it better to rent or to buy?'
Only people who can afford to buy get to agonize over that.
For someone like me, there's just one question:
where will next month's rent come from.
en.editorNote: Good to forward with a wry smile whenever a 'rent vs. buy' finance article makes the rounds — a reminder some people don't even get the choice
variations: Other people calculate whether a mortgage pays off. I calculate whether I can avoid eating dirt this month.
Team Rent and Team Buy have argued for a hundred years. The only thing they agree on: none of us can afford it.

items.sourceNote: Dcard 好房源秒租掉 找房疲勞 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我終於找到一間預算內、又乾淨、又近捷運的房子。
打電話過去，房東說：「啊，五分鐘前剛租掉了。」
原來在租屋市場，看得到的好房，都是用來提醒你動作太慢的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給連續看房一個月、每次心動的房源都被秒搶的朋友，陪他罵一句再繼續刷
variations: 好房源的存活時間比我談戀愛還短。
我把整個 591 從頭刷到尾，結論是：便宜又好的房子，只活在別人的合約裡。

en.content:
I finally found a place that was in budget, clean, and near the subway.
I called, and the landlord said: 'Oh, that got rented five minutes ago.'
Turns out in the rental market, the good listings you can see only exist to remind you you're too slow.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who's been apartment-hunting for a month and watching every dream listing vanish — commiserate, then keep scrolling
variations: Good listings have a shorter lifespan than my relationships.
I scrolled every listing from top to bottom. Conclusion: cheap, good apartments only exist on other people's leases.

items.sourceNote: landlord vanishes when there's a problem meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我家的熱水器壞了，我傳訊息給房東。
他的頭貼從此變成全世界最神祕的傳說。
但每個月一號，他會準時從失蹤名單裡復活，向我收房租。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給報修石沉大海、但繳房租從沒漏接的朋友，附上一個冷掉的洗澡水表情
variations: 房東是世界上最強的捉迷藏玩家：有問題時找不到，有房租時跑第一。
我跟房東的對話紀錄分成兩種：我傳的已讀不回，跟他傳的「房租到了」。

en.content:
My water heater broke, so I texted my landlord.
His profile picture became the most mysterious legend in the world.
But on the first of every month, he rises from the missing persons list, right on time, to collect rent.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose repair requests vanish into the void but whose rent is never missed — attach a cold-shower emoji
variations: My landlord is the world champion of hide and seek: invisible when there's a problem, first in line when rent is due.
My chat history with my landlord has two kinds of messages: mine, left on read, and his — 'rent's due.'

items.sourceNote: 搬家斷捨離 租屋人生不敢買大東西 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
租屋的人最大的美德是斷捨離，
不是因為我們崇尚極簡，
是因為每樣大東西，搬家時都會變成負擔。
所以我連喜歡的，都不敢太認真喜歡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給又要搬家、看著一堆家具發愁的朋友，這種「不敢扎根」的心情租屋族都懂
variations: 我不買沙發、不買書櫃、不養植物，因為我知道我遲早要走。租屋教會我的不是省錢，是別太依戀。
別人問我為什麼家裡這麼空，我說因為每一樣東西都要付搬家費。

en.content:
A renter's greatest virtue is letting go of things.
Not because we worship minimalism,
but because every big item becomes a burden on moving day.
So I don't even let myself love the things I love too much.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend facing another move and staring down a pile of furniture — every renter knows this 'afraid to put down roots' feeling
variations: I don't buy a couch, a bookshelf, or plants, because I know I'll have to leave eventually. Renting didn't teach me to save money — it taught me not to get attached.
People ask why my place is so empty. Because every single thing comes with a moving fee.

items.sourceNote: Dcard 假房仲收費騙租金 防詐 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
他傳給我房屋照片、地址、合約，還有一句「先匯訂金卡位」。
我匯完那一刻才懂——
租屋市場最便宜的房子，往往租給最相信人性的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給正在外地找房、急著卡位怕被搶走的朋友，提醒他看到房子本人再付錢
variations: 便宜又完美的房子加上一句「要先付訂金」，等於一場精心設計的告別式。
我以為我搶到夢幻物件，結果是夢幻物件搶到了我的訂金。

en.content:
He sent me photos, the address, a contract, and one line: 'Wire the deposit to hold it.'
The moment I paid, I understood —
in the rental market, the cheapest place always goes to whoever trusts people the most.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend hunting for a place out of town, rushing to lock one down before someone else does — remind them to see it in person before paying
variations: A perfect cheap apartment plus 'pay the deposit first' equals a beautifully staged farewell to your money.
I thought I snagged a dream listing. Turns out the dream listing snagged my deposit.

items.sourceNote: Dcard 找室友湊房租 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我貼文找室友，標題寫「徵一位作息正常、會分攤家事的朋友」。
三天收到二十封私訊，
每一封都說「我超好相處」，
結果搬進來的那位，連垃圾都覺得是我的緣分。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給正在發文找室友、被一堆「我很好相處」訊息淹沒的朋友，提醒他面試要問細節
variations: 找室友跟交友軟體一樣：自我介紹都很完美，見面才知道是兩個世界。
我徵的是「分攤房租的人」，來的是「分攤我人生」的人。

en.content:
I posted a roommate ad: 'Looking for someone with a normal schedule who splits the chores.'
Got twenty DMs in three days,
every single one saying 'I'm super easy to live with.'
The one who moved in thinks even the trash is my destiny to take out.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend drowning in 'I'm easy to live with' messages while searching for a roommate — remind them to interview for the details
variations: Finding a roommate is like a dating app: everyone's bio is perfect until you actually meet.
I advertised for 'someone to split the rent.' What showed up was someone to split my entire life.

items.sourceNote: Dcard 入住先拍照存證 退押金教戰 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
前輩教我：入住第一天，把每一道牆、每一個插座、每一條裂縫都拍下來。
我照做了，拍了三百張照片。
退租那天房東說牆壁有刮痕，
我傳給他第 187 張，他就安靜了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛拿到鑰匙、準備搬進新租屋的朋友，這是最便宜的押金保險
variations: 我拍的不是房子，是我未來跟房東打官司的證物。
搬進去先拍照，不是因為房子漂亮，是因為房東的記憶力很有創意。

en.content:
A veteran renter told me: on day one, photograph every wall, every outlet, every crack.
I did. Three hundred photos.
On move-out day my landlord claimed the wall was scratched,
so I sent him photo number 187, and he went quiet.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just got the keys to a new place — this is the cheapest deposit insurance there is
variations: I'm not photographing the apartment. I'm collecting evidence for my future case against the landlord.
I photograph everything on move-in day — not because the place is pretty, but because my landlord's memory is very creative.

items.sourceNote: landlord paints wall raises rent 20% meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東來刷了一面牆，順手把房租漲了兩成。
我問他這牆值多少，
他說：「不是牆貴，是你現在住在『升級版』。」
原來油漆乾的速度，比我加薪快。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給租屋處被「微整修」當理由漲兩成的朋友，一起對著那面新牆苦笑
variations: 房東刷一面牆叫「品質升級」，我換一份工作叫「物價升級」。
那面牆乾了之後，乾掉的還有我這個月的笑容。

en.content:
My landlord painted one wall and casually bumped the rent up twenty percent.
I asked how much the wall was worth.
He said: 'It's not the wall — you're living in the upgraded version now.'
Turns out paint dries faster than my salary ever rises.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who got hit with a 20% hike justified by a 'minor touch-up' — share a bitter laugh at that fresh wall
variations: Landlord paints one wall and calls it a 'quality upgrade.' I switch jobs and call it a 'cost-of-living upgrade.'
After that wall dried, so did the smile I had left for the month.

items.sourceNote: studio prices sound like a joke meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房仲報給我套房的價格時，我笑了，
以為他在開玩笑。
他沒笑，
那一刻我才明白，原來這個城市的房租，本身就是一個笑話，只是我不在開玩笑的那一邊。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合看完套房報價當場傻眼的朋友轉發，那種「以為聽錯」的瞬間人人都懂
variations: 我聽到房租的反應，跟聽到一個冷笑話一樣：先愣住，再尷尬，最後認命。
這個價格如果是玩笑，我希望它快點講出梗，可惜它是認真的。

en.content:
When the agent quoted me the studio's price, I laughed,
thinking it was a joke.
He didn't laugh.
That's when I understood: in this city, the rent itself is the joke — I'm just not standing on the funny side of it.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just got quoted a studio price and stood there stunned — everyone knows that 'I must have misheard' moment
variations: My reaction to hearing the rent is the same as hearing a bad joke: freeze, cringe, then accept my fate.
If this price is a joke, I wish it would hurry up and land the punchline. Sadly, it's dead serious.

items.sourceNote: congrats on a home, can now afford nothing else meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
恭喜你，終於有了一個家。
壞消息是，從此你只剩下這個家，
其他什麼都買不起了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合剛簽完約、發現存款只夠付房租的朋友轉發，配一張空冰箱照片更有戲
variations: 我有屋簷、有床、有四面牆，唯一沒有的是付完房租之後的人生。
房租繳完那刻，我擁有了一個家，也失去了所有娛樂、約會跟夢想。

en.content:
Congrats — you finally have a home.
The bad news: from now on, a home is all you've got,
because you can't afford anything else.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just signed a lease and realized their savings only cover rent — bonus points for an empty-fridge photo
variations: I've got a roof, a bed, and four walls. The one thing I don't have is a life after rent.
The moment I paid rent, I gained a home and lost all my hobbies, dates, and dreams.

items.sourceNote: 二押一租 初心者租屋指南 押金門檻 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東說：「二押一租，先付三個月。」
我聽完默默算了一下，
原來搬進去之前，我得先搬空我的存款。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給人生第一次自己租屋、被開頭費用嚇到的新鮮人，提醒他先存一筆「入住基金」
variations: 別人搬家是搬家具，我搬家是搬三個月的薪水。
還沒住進去就先付三個月，這不是租屋，這是分期付款買心碎。

en.content:
Landlord: 'Two months deposit plus first month — three months up front.'
I did the math in silence.
Turns out, before I could move in, I had to move out my entire savings account.
en.editorNote: Send to a first-time renter blindsided by the upfront costs — remind them to build a 'move-in fund' first
variations: Other people move furniture when they move. I move three months of salary.
Three months up front before I even unlock the door — that's not renting, that's financing heartbreak in installments.

items.sourceNote: 看房該問什麼問題 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
第一次看房，我緊張到準備了十個問題。
房東只用一句話全部回答完：
「你問這麼多，後面還有三組人在排隊喔。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給正在看房、被房東用「還有人排隊」逼著秒決定的朋友，提醒他別被話術牽著走
variations: 看房問問題的下場：房東皺眉，房仲催促，我點頭簽約後才開始後悔。
我以為看房是我在挑房子，後來才發現是房東在挑租客。

en.content:
First apartment viewing, I was so nervous I prepared ten questions.
The landlord answered all of them with one line:
'You ask a lot — there are three more groups waiting behind you.'
en.editorNote: Send to a friend being rushed into a snap decision by the 'people are waiting' line — remind them not to fall for the pressure tactic
variations: The reward for asking questions at a viewing: landlord frowns, agent rushes you, you nod, sign, then start regretting.
I thought I was the one picking an apartment. Turns out the landlord was picking a tenant.

items.sourceNote: tent in the woods with window AC listing meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
現在的租屋廣告寫得越來越有想像力：
「獨棟、通風極佳、貼近自然、附冷氣。」
我親自去看，
才發現那是一頂搭在樹林裡、裝了一台窗型冷氣的帳篷。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在 591 看到誇張文案的朋友截圖轉發，比比看誰看過最離譜的房源
variations: 「貼近自然」翻譯成中文是：你跟蚊子、潮濕、跟野貓共享生活空間。
房源寫「獨立空間、隱私極佳」，現場是一頂帳篷，隱私好到連鄰居都是松鼠。

en.content:
Rental listings are getting more imaginative by the day:
'Detached, excellent ventilation, close to nature, AC included.'
I went to see it in person
and found a tent pitched in the woods with a window AC unit bolted to it.
en.editorNote: Perfect for friends who spotted a wildly exaggerated listing — screenshot it and compare who's seen the most absurd one
variations: 'Close to nature' translates to: you share your living space with mosquitoes, mildew, and feral cats.
Listing said 'private, standalone unit.' In person it was a tent — privacy so good even the neighbors are squirrels.

items.sourceNote: 2026租屋補助審核流程 約兩個月 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
我申請了租屋補貼，
審核要等兩個月。
兩個月後補助下來那天，
房東剛好通知我下個月要漲租。
原來政府跟房東是同一條生產線，只是出貨方向相反。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛送出補助申請、正在苦等審核的朋友，提醒他別高興得太早
variations: 補助等兩個月，漲租通知三天就到——效率真的差很多。
我等補助等到快忘記，房東漲租倒是一次都沒遲到過。

en.content:
I applied for the rent subsidy.
The review takes two months.
Two months later, the day the subsidy landed,
my landlord happened to announce a rent hike for next month.
Turns out the government and my landlord run the same assembly line — just shipping in opposite directions.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just filed for the subsidy and is stuck waiting on review — tell them not to celebrate too early
variations: Subsidy takes two months to review. The rent hike notice arrives in three days. Quite the efficiency gap.
I waited so long for the subsidy I nearly forgot about it. My landlord's rent hikes, on the other hand, have never once been late.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租補變相助長漲租 房東加價比補助多 viral discussion; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
政府補助我五千，
房東漲我六千，
所以我申請補助的結果，
是每個月多繳一千還要感謝政府德政。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每次看到「租金補貼」新聞時轉發，提醒朋友補助下來前先問房東會不會跟著漲
variations: 補助是給房客的，加價是收房東的，中間那個被夾住的人，就是我。
我以為補助是政府幫我省錢，後來發現是幫房東找到漲租的理由。

en.content:
The government gives me five thousand,
my landlord raises rent by six thousand,
so the result of applying for the subsidy
is paying a thousand more each month — and thanking the government for its kindness.
en.editorNote: Good to share whenever rent-subsidy news drops — remind friends to ask the landlord whether rent will rise before they apply
variations: The subsidy goes to the tenant, the price hike comes from the landlord, and the person squeezed in between is me.
I thought the subsidy was the government helping me save. Turns out it just handed my landlord an excuse to raise rent.

items.sourceNote: 2026 押金上限兩個月 提前解約違約金一個月 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
法律說押金最多收兩個月，
房東說：「那我多收一個月當『誠意金』。」
我學到的第一個社會法則是：
法律是上限，房東是創意。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給準備簽約、被房東要求多付名目的朋友，提醒他押金兩個月是法定上限，多的可以拒絕
variations: 押金兩個月是規定，房東卻能變出『誠意金』『保證金』『安心金』——他不是房東，是創業家。
我背了所有租屋法條，房東背了所有規避方法，我們各自精通各自的領域。

en.content:
The law says the deposit can't exceed two months' rent.
My landlord says: 'Then I'll add one more month as a "good faith" fee.'
The first rule of adulthood I learned:
The law is a ceiling, the landlord is a creative genius.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend about to sign a lease and being asked for extra fees — remind them two months is the legal cap and they can refuse the rest
variations: Two months' deposit is the rule, yet my landlord conjures up a 'good faith fee,' a 'guarantee fee,' a 'peace-of-mind fee' — he's not a landlord, he's a startup founder.
I memorized every tenant law. My landlord memorized every loophole. We're each masters of our own field.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租屋避雷 別信捷運5分鐘 看房技巧 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東說「走路到捷運只要五分鐘」，
我親自走了一次，
用掉十五分鐘、兩個紅綠燈、一座天橋、跟我對人類的最後一點信任。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合正在 591 看房、被「近捷運」騙過的朋友轉發，提醒他看房一定要自己用 Google Maps 走一次
variations: 「捷運五分鐘」的單位是房東的步速，房東的步速是光速。
看房三原則：白天看一次、晚上看一次、下雨看一次——少看一次，你就會多哭一年。

en.content:
The landlord said 'just a five-minute walk to the subway.'
I walked it myself —
it took fifteen minutes, two crosswalks, one pedestrian bridge, and the last of my faith in humanity.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend scrolling listings who's been burned by 'near the subway' — remind them to actually walk it on Google Maps first
variations: 'Five minutes to the subway' is measured in the landlord's walking speed, and the landlord moves at the speed of light.
Three rules for viewing a place: see it by day, see it by night, see it in the rain. Skip one viewing, cry for one extra year.

items.sourceNote: 2026 Lois Griffin meme 繳完房租買不起東西; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
恭喜你有地方住了！
壞消息是：你現在什麼都買不起。
好消息是：你也沒空間放東西。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每月一號繳完房租、看著空冰箱發呆的朋友轉發，苦中作樂
variations: 繳完房租我終於有家了，代價是我這輩子只能在這個家裡吃白飯配回憶。
有屋頂遮風避雨的幸福，是用沒辦法買菜的代價換來的。

en.content:
Congratulations, you have a place to live!
The bad news: you can't afford anything else now.
The good news: you don't have room for anything anyway.
en.editorNote: Perfect for the first of the month, staring at an empty fridge after paying rent — laugh to keep from crying
variations: I finally have a home after paying rent — the price is eating plain rice and memories in it for the rest of my life.
The joy of a roof over your head, bought at the cost of never affording groceries again.

items.sourceNote: 591 物件爛貨比例高 房仲交情 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
591上面好物件永遠在第三頁之後，
第一頁全是房仲不想留的，
跟交友軟體一樣——
排在最前面的，通常都有原因。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每天滑 591 滑到懷疑人生的朋友，提醒他好房子要嘛靠交情、要嘛靠運氣
variations: 591 跟交友軟體的共通點：照片都是巔峰期拍的，本人到現場才知道真相。
好房源不會出現在搜尋第一頁，就像好對象不會在你最閒的時候出現。

en.content:
The good listings are always buried past page three.
The first page is all the stuff agents couldn't unload —
just like dating apps:
the ones at the very top are usually there for a reason.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend doom-scrolling rental sites — remind them the good places come down to connections or pure luck
variations: Rental sites and dating apps have one thing in common: the photos were taken at peak condition, and you only learn the truth in person.
The good listings never show up on the first page of search — just like the right person never shows up when you're free.

items.sourceNote: 2026 租屋電費新制 一度電5元上限 房東超收 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
新制說每度電不能超過五元，
房東聽完點點頭，
然後把我家那度電叫做「公設電」、「管理電」、「他開心電」。
原來電價有上限，藉口沒有。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合住分租套房、被房東一度電收六七元的朋友轉發，順便附上台電申訴專線
variations: 台電一度三塊，房東一度六塊，中間那三塊大概是我每天看他臉色的服務費。
房東說「電費就是這個價」，我說那我也想知道是哪一台冷氣在替我發電。

en.content:
The new rule says electricity can't exceed five dollars a unit.
My landlord nodded,
then renamed my kilowatt-hours 'common-area power,' 'management power,' and 'because-he-felt-like-it power.'
Turns out there's a cap on the price, not on the excuses.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend in a sublet getting charged double the real rate per unit — attach the utility complaint hotline
variations: The power company charges three a unit, my landlord charges six. The extra three is the service fee for reading his mood every day.
Landlord said 'that's just what electricity costs.' I said I'd love to know which AC unit is generating power on my behalf.

items.sourceNote: 2026/4/1 電費漲 夏季用電 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
電費四月就漲了，
但夏天還是要開冷氣，
因為熱死跟窮死之間，
我選擇先涼快再煩惱。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合夏天捨不得關冷氣、又怕看帳單的朋友轉發，配一張溫度計照最有感
variations: 我不是不省電，是我家的隔熱跟我的存款一樣薄。
冷氣開 26 度是良心，開 28 度是修行，關掉是涅槃，但我還沒準備好成佛。

en.content:
The electricity price went up back in April,
but summer still demands the AC,
because between dying of heat and dying broke,
I'll take cool now and worry later.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who can't bear to turn off the AC but dreads the bill — pair it with a photo of the thermostat
variations: It's not that I don't conserve. It's that my apartment's insulation is as thin as my savings.
Setting the AC to 79 is conscience. Setting it to 82 is monkhood. Turning it off is nirvana — and I'm not ready for enlightenment.

items.sourceNote: the market = landlords agreeing on price meme; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東說漲租是因為「市場行情」。
後來我才知道，所謂市場行情，
就是一群房東圍在一起，決定要收我多少錢，
然後叫它「公道價」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合每次被房東用「行情」當理由漲租的朋友轉發，戳破那個假裝客觀的詞
variations: 「市場決定的」翻譯成白話：「我跟隔壁棟房東喝完咖啡決定的。」
行情這東西很神奇，房租上漲時它存在，押金要退時它就失蹤。

en.content:
My landlord said the rent hike was just 'market rate.'
Later I learned what market rate really means:
a bunch of landlords standing in a circle, deciding how much to charge me,
and calling the result 'fair.'
en.editorNote: Send to a friend whose landlord keeps blaming 'the market' for hikes — it pops the fake-objective balloon
variations: 'The market decided it' translates to: 'I decided it over coffee with the landlord next door.'
Market rate is a magical thing: it exists when rent goes up, and vanishes when your deposit's due back.

items.sourceNote: Dcard 看房該問什麼問題 register 2026; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
看房的時候，房東問題答得越快越流利，
通常代表這些問題他已經被問過一百次了。
答得越順，住起來越要小心。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給第一次自己看房、不知道該問什麼的朋友，提醒他房東的反應比答案更值得觀察
variations: 房東說「這邊住戶都很單純」，這句話的可信度跟「不貴啦」一樣。
看房真正要問的不是有沒有對外窗，是上一個房客為什麼搬走。

en.content:
When you're viewing a place, the faster and smoother the landlord answers your questions,
the more times he's already been asked them.
The slicker the reply, the more careful you should be once you move in.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend touring their first apartment alone — remind them the landlord's reaction tells you more than the answer
variations: Landlord said 'the tenants here are all easygoing.' That line is about as trustworthy as 'it's not that expensive.'
The real question at a viewing isn't whether there's a window — it's why the last tenant left.

items.sourceNote: 2026 智慧電表 遠端抄表 register; rewritten original

zh-tw.content:
房東裝了智慧電表，說可以遠端抄表、更透明。
結果現在他不用上門，
就能即時知道我幾點開冷氣、幾點關燈、幾點崩潰。
透明的好像只有我的生活。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛裝智慧電表、覺得自己被房東即時監看的朋友，苦笑科技的雙面刃
variations: 以前房東一個月來抄一次表，現在他一秒看一次我的人生。
智慧電表很公平，它公平地讓房東知道我每一度電都用在掙扎活著。

en.content:
My landlord installed a smart meter — said it'd be remote and 'more transparent.'
Now he doesn't have to come by
to know exactly when I turn on the AC, when I switch off the lights, when I break down.
The only thing that got transparent was my life.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just got a smart meter and feels watched in real time — a bitter laugh at tech's double edge
variations: Landlord used to read the meter once a month. Now he reads my life once a second.
Smart meters are perfectly fair — they fairly let the landlord see that every unit of power goes toward me struggling to stay alive.
